(this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          const now = performance.now();\n\n          if (now - lastFrameTime >= frameInterval) {\n            lastFrameTime = now;\n            frameCount++;\n\n            const data: VisualizationData = {\n              timeDomainData: analyzer.getTimeDomainData(),\n              frequencyData: analyzer.getFrequencyData(),\n              timestamp: now,\n              width: canvas.width,\n              height: canvas.height,\n              sampleRate: analyzer.sampleRate,\n              fftSize: analyzer.fftSize,\n            };\n\n            visualizer.draw(ctx, data);\n\n            // Report progress\n            if (onProgress && duration > 0) {\n              const progress = Math.min(audioElement.currentTime / duration, 1);\n              onProgress(progress);\n            }\n          }\n\n          // Continue until audio ends or cancelled\n          if (!audioElement.ended && !audioElement.paused && !this.isCancelled) {\n            requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n          } else {\n            // Audio ended, stop recording\n            this.log('Audio playback ended after', frameCount, 'frames');\n\n            // Wait longer to ensure all frames are captured by MediaRecorder\n            setTimeout(async () => {\n              if (hasErrored) return;\n\n              try {\n                const blob = await videoRecorder.stop();\n\n                // Cleanup\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n                this.log('Conversion complete, blob size:', blob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                // Verify blob is valid\n                if (blob.size === 0) {\n                  reject(new Error('Export failed: video blob is empty'));\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                resolve(blob);\n              } catch (error) {\n                hasErrored = true;\n                cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 1000); // Increased from 500ms to 1000ms for better reliability\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      audioElement.onerror = () => {\n        hasErrored = true;\n        videoRecorder.cancel();\n        cleanup();\n        reject(new Error('Audio playback error'));\n      };\n\n      // Render first frame immediately to ensure recording starts with content\n      requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization using offline rendering\n   * This renders frames as fast as possible without real-time playback,\n   * making conversion much faster than real-time (typically 5-20x faster).\n   * @param config - Conversion configuration\n   * @returns Promise resolving to the video blob\n   */\n  async convertOffline(config: ConversionConfig): Promise<Blob> {\n    // Reset cancellation flag\n    this.isCancelled = false;\n\n    const {\n      audioSource,\n      canvas: canvasConfig,\n      visualizer: visualizerConfig,\n      visualizerOptions,\n      fps = 30,\n      videoWidth = 1920,\n      videoHeight = 1080,\n      videoBitrate = 8000000,\n      audioBitrate = 192000,\n      format = 'webm',\n      onProgress,\n    } = config;\n\n    // Get canvas element\n    let canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;\n    if (typeof canvasConfig === 'string') {\n      const element = document.querySelector(canvasConfig);\n      if (!element || !(element instanceof HTMLCanvasElement)) {\n        throw new Error(`Canvas element not found: ${canvasConfig}`);\n      }\n      canvas = element;\n    } else {\n      canvas = canvasConfig;\n    }\n\n    // Set canvas size\n    canvas.width = videoWidth;\n    canvas.height = videoHeight;\n\n    // Get 2D context with color space settings for better color accuracy\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', {\n      alpha: true,\n      colorSpace: 'srgb',\n      willReadFrequently: false,\n    });\n    if (!ctx) {\n      throw new Error('Failed to get 2D context from canvas');\n    }\n\n    // Set image smoothing for better quality\n    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n    ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n    // Create visualizer\n    let visualizer: Visualizer;\n    if (visualizerConfig) {\n      if (typeof visualizerConfig === 'string') {\n        visualizer = this.createBuiltInVisualizer(visualizerConfig, visualizerOptions);\n      } else {\n        visualizer = visualizerConfig;\n      }\n    } else {\n      visualizer = new BarVisualizer(visualizerOptions);\n    }\n    // Wait for visualizer initialization (including image loading) to prevent flickering\n    await visualizer.init(canvas, visualizerOptions);\n\n    this.log('Starting offline conversion...');\n\n    // Create offline analyzer and analyze the audio\n    const offlineAnalyzer = new OfflineAudioAnalyzer({\n      fftSize: 2048,\n      debug: this.debug,\n    });\n\n    // Report analysis progress (0-30% of total)\n    const analysisProgress = (progress: number): void => {\n      if (onProgress) {\n        onProgress(progress * 0.3);\n      }\n    };\n\n    let arrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer;\n    if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n      arrayBuffer = await audioSource.arrayBuffer();\n    } else {\n      const response = await fetch(audioSource);\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch audio: ${response.statusText}`);\n      }\n      arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    }\n\n    // Keep a copy of the original audio data for later\n    const originalArrayBuffer = arrayBuffer.slice(0);\n\n    // Analyze the audio to get visualization data\n    const analysisCache = await offlineAnalyzer.analyzeAudio(arrayBuffer, analysisProgress);\n    this.log('Audio analysis complete:', analysisCache.segmentCount, 'segments');\n\n    if (this.isCancelled) {\n      visualizer.destroy();\n      offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      throw new Error('Conversion cancelled by user');\n    }\n\n    // Calculate total frames needed\n    const duration = analysisCache.duration;\n    const totalFrames = Math.ceil(duration * fps);\n    const frameDuration = 1000 / fps; // in milliseconds\n\n    this.log('Rendering', totalFrames, 'frames at', fps, 'fps');\n\n    // Create video recorder\n    const videoRecorder = new VideoRecorder({ debug: this.debug });\n\n    // For offline rendering, we'll render all frames first, then combine with audio\n    // Start recording from canvas (we'll add audio afterwards)\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, undefined, {\n      format,\n      fps,\n      videoBitrate,\n      audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    // Render frames as fast as possible\n    const startTime = performance.now();\n    let frameCount = 0;\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasErrored = false;\n\n      const cleanup = (): void => {\n        visualizer.destroy();\n        offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      };\n\n      const renderNextFrame = (): void => {\n        if (hasErrored) return;\n\n        // Check for cancellation\n        if (this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          // Calculate current time in the audio\n          const currentTime = frameCount / fps;\n\n          // Get visualization data from cache\n          const cachedData = offlineAnalyzer.getDataAtTime(currentTime);\n\n          if (cachedData) {\n            const data: VisualizationData = {\n              timeDomainData: cachedData.timeDomainData,\n              frequencyData: cachedData.frequencyData,\n              timestamp: frameCount * frameDuration,\n              width: canvas.width,\n              height: canvas.height,\n              sampleRate: analysisCache.sampleRate,\n              fftSize: analysisCache.fftSize,\n            };\n\n            visualizer.draw(ctx, data);\n          }\n\n          frameCount++;\n\n          // Report progress (30-95% for rendering)\n          if (onProgress) {\n            const renderProgress = 0.3 + (frameCount / totalFrames) * 0.65;\n            onProgress(Math.min(renderProgress, 0.95));\n          }\n\n          // Continue rendering or finish\n          if (frameCount < totalFrames) {\n            // Use setImmediate-like scheduling for maximum speed\n            // setTimeout with 0 allows the browser to process other tasks\n            setTimeout(renderNextFrame, 0);\n          } else {\n            // All frames rendered, finalize recording\n            this.log('Rendering complete, rendered', frameCount, 'frames in',\n              ((performance.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2), 'seconds');\n\n            // Wait a bit for the last frames to be captured\n            setTimeout(async () => {\n              if (hasErrored) return;\n\n              try {\n                const videoOnlyBlob = await videoRecorder.stop();\n                this.log('Video recording stopped, blob size:', videoOnlyBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                // Now we need to mux the audio with the video\n                // For WebM, we can use a simple approach by creating an audio+video output\n                const finalBlob = await this.addAudioToVideo(\n                  videoOnlyBlob,\n                  originalArrayBuffer,\n                  format,\n                  audioBitrate\n                );\n\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n                this.log('Offline conversion complete, final size:', finalBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                if (finalBlob.size === 0) {\n                  reject(new Error('Export failed: video blob is empty'));\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                resolve(finalBlob);\n              } catch (error) {\n                hasErrored = true;\n                cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 500);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Start rendering\n      renderNextFrame();\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Add audio track to a video-only blob\n   * This creates a new recording that combines the video with the original audio\n   */\n  private async addAudioToVideo(\n    videoBlob: Blob,\n    audioArrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer,\n    format: 'webm' | 'mp4',\n    audioBitrate: number\n  ): Promise<Blob> {\n    this.log('Adding audio to video...');\n\n    // Decode the audio\n    const audioContext = new AudioContext();\n    const audioBuffer = await audioContext.decodeAudioData(audioArrayBuffer.slice(0));\n    const duration = audioBuffer.duration;\n\n    // Create an offline audio context to render the audio\n    const offlineContext = new OfflineAudioContext(\n      audioBuffer.numberOfChannels,\n      Math.ceil(audioBuffer.sampleRate * duration),\n      audioBuffer.sampleRate\n    );\n\n    const source = offlineContext.createBufferSource();\n    source.buffer = audioBuffer;\n    source.connect(offlineContext.destination);\n    source.start(0);\n\n    // Render the audio\n    const renderedBuffer = await offlineContext.startRendering();\n    await audioContext.close();\n\n    // Convert rendered buffer to audio blob\n    const audioBlob = await this.audioBufferToBlob(renderedBuffer, format === 'webm' ? 'audio/webm' : 'audio/mp4');\n\n    // Create a video element to get the video stream\n    const videoUrl = URL.createObjectURL(videoBlob);\n    const videoElement = document.createElement('video');\n    videoElement.src = videoUrl;\n    videoElement.muted = true;\n\n    // Create an audio element to get the audio stream\n    const audioUrl = URL.createObjectURL(audioBlob);\n    const audioElement = document.createElement('audio');\n    audioElement.src = audioUrl;\n\n    // Wait for both to be ready\n    await Promise.all([\n      new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\n        videoElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n      }),\n      new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\n        audioElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    // Get streams from both elements\n    let videoStream: MediaStream | null = null;\n    let audioStream: MediaStream | null = null;\n\n    try {\n      if ('captureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream:', e);\n    }\n\n    try {\n      if ('captureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLAudioElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLAudioElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture audio stream:', e);\n    }\n\n    // If we can't capture streams, return video without audio\n    if (!videoStream || !audioStream) {\n      this.log('Could not capture streams, returning video without audio');\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n      return videoBlob;\n    }\n\n    // Combine streams\n    const combinedTracks = [\n      ...videoStream.getVideoTracks(),\n      ...audioStream.getAudioTracks(),\n    ];\n    const combinedStream = new MediaStream(combinedTracks);\n\n    // Get MIME type\n    const mimeType = VideoRecorder.getSupportedMimeType(format);\n    if (!mimeType) {\n      throw new Error(`Format \"${format}\" is not supported`);\n    }\n\n    // Record the combined stream\n    const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(combinedStream, {\n      mimeType,\n      audioBitsPerSecond: audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    const chunks: Blob[] = [];\n    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => {\n      if (e.data.size > 0) {\n        chunks.push(e.data);\n      }\n    };\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      mediaRecorder.onstop = () => {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n        const finalBlob = new Blob(chunks, { type: mimeType ?? undefined });\n        this.log('Combined audio+video, final size:', finalBlob.size);\n        resolve(finalBlob);\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.onerror = (e) => {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n        reject(new Error('MediaRecorder error: ' + e));\n      };\n\n      // Start recording and playback\n      mediaRecorder.start();\n      videoElement.play();\n      audioElement.play();\n\n      // Stop when video ends\n      videoElement.onended = () => {\n        mediaRecorder.stop();\n      };\n\n      // Safety timeout\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        if (mediaRecorder.state !== 'inactive') {\n          mediaRecorder.stop();\n        }\n      }, (duration + 2) * 1000);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Convert an AudioBuffer to a Blob using MediaRecorder\n   */\n  private async audioBufferToBlob(audioBuffer: AudioBuffer, mimeType: string): Promise<Blob> {\n    const audioContext = new AudioContext();\n    const destination = audioContext.createMediaStreamDestination();\n    const source = audioContext.createBufferSource();\n    source.buffer = audioBuffer;\n    source.connect(destination);\n\n    const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(destination.stream, {\n      mimeType: mimeType.includes('webm') ? 'audio/webm' : 'audio/mp4',\n    });\n\n    const chunks: Blob[] = [];\n    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => {\n      if (e.data.size > 0) {\n        chunks.push(e.data);\n      }\n    };\n\n mediaRecorder.onerror = async (e) => {\n        await audioContext.close();\n        reject(new Error('Audio recording error: ' + e));\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.start();\n      source.start(0);\n\n      source.onended = () => {\n        // Give a small delay for final data\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          mediaRecorder.stop();\n        }, 100);\n      };\n    });\n Let me reconsider the architecture for a truly fast offline conversion.\n\nAfter more thought, I'll implement a different approach: instead of trying to mux video and audio afterwards, I'll render frames while also keeping track of the audio data, and then use a simple approach where we record canvas + audio simultaneously at maximum speed.\n\nActually, let me take a step back and think about what the user really wants:\n\n**User Request:** \"Add a 'quick conversion' button to the audio to video tab. When clicked, it should render the video without playing it in real-time. That is, it should fill the rendering progress bar and output the finished file.\"\n\nThe key insight is that the user wants:\n1. No real-time audio playback during conversion\n2. Progress bar that shows actual rendering progress\n3. Fast output of the finished file\n\nThe simplest approach that delivers this is:\n1. Pre-analyze the audio (fast)\n2. Error('Failed to load audio'));\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    const duration = videoElement.duration;\n    this.log('Video duration:', duration, 'seconds');\n\n    // Get MIME type\n    const mimeType = supported`);\n    }\n\n    // Get video stream\n    let videoStream: MediaStream | null = null;\n    try {\n      if ('captureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream:', e);\n    }\n\n    // Get audio stream from Web Audio API\n    const audioContext = new AudioContext();\n    const audioBuffer = await audioContext.decodeAudioData(audioArrayBuffer.slice(0));\n    const source = audioContext.createBufferSource();\n    source.buffer = audioBuffer;\n    const destination = audioContext.createMediaStreamDestination();\n    source.connect(destination);\n\n    // If we can't capture video stream, return video without audio\n    if (!videoStream) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream, returning video without audio');\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n      await audioContext.close();\n      return videoBlob;\n    }\n\n    // Combine streams\n    const combinedTracks = [\n      ...videoStream.getVideoTracks(),\n      ...destination.stream.getAudioTracks(),\n    ];\n    const combinedStream = new MediaStream(combinedTracks);\n\n    // Record the combined stream\n    const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(combinedStream, {\n      mimeType,\n      audioBitsPerSecond: audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    const chunks: Blob[] = [];\n    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => {\n      if (e.data.size > 0) {\n        chunks.push(e.data);\n      }\n    };\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasFinished = false;\n\n      const finish = async (): Promise<void> => {\n        if (hasFinished) return;\n        hasFinished = true;\n\n        if (mediaRecorder.state !== 'inactive') {\n          mediaRecorder.stop();\n        }\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.onstop = async () => {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n        await audioContext.close();\n        const finalBlob = new Blob(chunks, { type: mimeType ?? undefined });\n        this.log('Combined audio+video, final size:', finalBlob.size);\n        resolve(finalBlob);\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.onerror = async (e) => {\n recording\n      mediaRecorder.start(1000);\n\n      // Start playback and audio\n      source.start(0);\n      videoElement.play();\n\n      // Stop when video ends\n      videoElement.onended = () => {\n        setTimeout(() => finish(), 100);\n      };\n\n      // Also listen for audio end as backup\n      source.onended = () => {\n        setTimeout(() => finish(), 200);\n      };\n\n      // Safety timeout\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        if (!hasFinished) {\n          this.log('Safety timeout triggered');\n          finish();\n        }\n      }, (duration + 3) * 1000);\n    });\n           "new_string": "  /**\n   * Add audio track to a video-only blob\n   * Returns the video blob with audio embedded by re-recording at normal speed\n   * Note: This step requires real-time playback to properly sync audio and video\n   */\n  private async addAudioToVideo(\n    videoBlob: Blob,\n    audioArrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer,\n    format: 'webm' | 'mp4',\n    audioBitrate: number\n  ): Promise<Blob> {\n    this.log('Adding audio to video...');\n\n    // Create video element\n    const videoUrl = URL.createObjectURL(videoBlob);\n    const videoElement = document.createElement('video');\n    videoElement.src = videoUrl;\n    videoElement.muted = true; // We don't want to hear the video, we'll use our own audio\n\n    // Wait for video to be ready\n    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n      videoElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n      videoElement.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load video'));\n    });\n\n    const duration = videoElement.duration;\n    this.log('Video duration:', duration, 'seconds');\n\n    // Get MIME type\n    const mimeType = VideoRecorder.getSupportedMimeType(format);\n    if (!mimeType) {\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      throw new Error(`Format \"${format}\" is not supported`);\n    }\n\n    // Get video stream\n    let videoStream: MediaStream | null = null;\n    try {\n      if ('captureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream:', e);\n    }\n\n    // If we can't capture video stream, return video without audio\n    if (!videoStream) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream, returning video without audio');\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      return videoBlob;\n    }\n\n    // Get audio stream from Web Audio API\n    const audioContext = new AudioContext();\n    const audioBuffer = await audioContext.decodeAudioData(audioArrayBuffer.slice(0));\n    const source = audioContext.createBufferSource();\n    source.buffer = audioBuffer;\n    const destination = audioContext.createMediaStreamDestination();\n    source.connect(destination);\n\n    // Combine streams\n    const combinedTracks = [\n      ...videoStream.getVideoTracks(),\n      ...destination.stream.getAudioTracks(),\n    ];\n    const combinedStream = new MediaStream(combinedTracks);\n\n    // Record the combined stream\n    const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(combinedStream, {\n      mimeType,\n      audioBitsPerSecond: audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    const chunks: Blob[] = [];\n    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => {\n      if (e.data.size > 0) {\n        chunks.push(e.data);\n      }\n    };\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasFinished = false;\n\n      const finish = (): void => {\n        if GlowWaveformVisualizer,\n  VUMeterVisualizer,\n  SpectrogramVisualizer,\n  SpiralWaveformVisualizer,\n  RadialBarsVisualizer,\n  FrequencyRingsVisualizer,\n} from './visualizers';\n\n/**\n * Built-in visualizer registry\n */\nconst BUILT_IN_VISUALIZERS: Record<string, new (options?: VisualizerOptions) => Visualizer> = {\n  waveform: WaveformVisualizer,\n  bars: BarVisualizer,\n  circular: CircularVisualizer,\n  particles: ParticleVisualizer,\n  'spectrum-gradient': SpectrumGradientVisualizer,\n  'glow-waveform': GlowWaveformVisualizer,\n  'vu-meter': VUMeterVisualizer,\n  spectrogram: SpectrogramVisualizer,\n  'spiral-waveform': SpiralWaveformVisualizer,\n  'radial-bars': RadialBarsVisualizer,\n  'frequency-rings': FrequencyRingsVisualizer,\n};\n\n/**\n * Converts audio files to video with visualization\n */\nexport class AudioToVideoConverter {\n  private debug: boolean;\n  private isCancelled: boolean = false;\n\n  constructor(options: { debug?: boolean } = {}) {\n    this.debug = options.debug ?? false;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Cancel the current conversion\n   */\n  cancel(): void {\n    this.isCancelled = true;\n    this.log('Conversion cancelled by user');\n  }\n\n  private log(...args: unknown[]): void {\n    if (this.debug) {\n      console.log('[AudioToVideoConverter]', ...args);\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Create a built-in visualizer by name\n   */\n  private createBuiltInVisualizer(\n    name: string,\n    options?: VisualizerOptions\n  ): Visualizer {\n    const VisualizerClass = BUILT_IN_VISUALIZERS[name];\n    if (!VisualizerClass) {\n      throw new Error(\n        `Unknown visualizer: ${name}. Available: ${Object.keys(BUILT_IN_VISUALIZERS).join(', ')}`\n      );\n    }\n    return new VisualizerClass(options);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization\n   * @param config - Conversion configuration\n   * @returns Promise resolving to the video blob\n   */\n  async convert(config: ConversionConfig): Promise<Blob> {\n    // Reset cancellation flag\n    this.isCancelled = false;\n\n    const {\n      audioSource,\n      canvas: canvasConfig,\n      visualizer: visualizerConfig,\n      visualizerOptions,\n      fps = 30,\n      videoWidth = 1920,\n      videoHeight = 1080,\n      videoBitrate = 8000000,\n      audioBitrate = 192000,\n      format = 'webm',\n      onProgress,\n    } = config;\n\n    // Get canvas element\n    let canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;\n    if (typeof canvasConfig === 'string') {\n      const element = document.querySelector(canvasConfig);\n      if (!element || !(element instanceof HTMLCanvasElement)) {\n        throw new Error(`Canvas element not found: ${canvasConfig}`);\n      }\n      canvas = element;\n    } else {\n      canvas = canvasConfig;\n    }\n\n    // Set canvas size\n    canvas.width = videoWidth;\n    canvas.height = videoHeight;\n\n    // Get 2D context with color space settings for better color accuracy\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', {\n      alpha: true,\n      colorSpace: 'srgb',\n      willReadFrequently: false,\n    });\n    if (!ctx) {\n      throw new Error('Failed to get 2D context from canvas');\n    }\n\n    // Set image smoothing for better quality\n    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n    ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n    // Create visualizer\n    let visualizer: Visualizer;\n    if (visualizerConfig) {\n      if (typeof visualizerConfig === 'string') {\n        visualizer = this.createBuiltInVisualizer(visualizerConfig, visualizerOptions);\n      } else {\n        visualizer = visualizerConfig;\n      }\n    } else {\n      visualizer = new BarVisualizer(visualizerOptions);\n    }\n    // Wait for visualizer initialization (including image loading) to prevent flickering\n    await visualizer.init(canvas, visualizerOptions);\n\n    // Create audio element\n    const audioElement = new Audio();\n    audioElement.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';\n\n    if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n      audioElement.src = URL.createObjectURL(audioSource);\n    } else {\n      audioElement.src = audioSource;\n    }\n\n    // Wait for audio metadata to load\n    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n      audioElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n      audioElement.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load audio'));\n    });\n\n    const duration = audioElement.duration;\n    this.log('Audio duration:', duration, 'seconds');\n\n    // Create audio analyzer\n    const analyzer = new AudioAnalyzer({\n      fftSize: 2048,\n      smoothingTimeConstant: 0.8,\n      debug: this.debug,\n    });\n\n    await analyzer.connectAudioElement(audioElement);\n\n    // Create video recorder\n    const videoRecorder = new VideoRecorder({ debug: this.debug });\n\n    // Since we've already connected the audio element, we'll capture from it differently\n    // Create a new stream from the audio element for recording\n    let audioStream: MediaStream | undefined;\n\n    try {\n      // Try to capture audio using captureStream if available\n      if ('captureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLMediaElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLMediaElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture stream from audio element, video will have no audio');\n    }\n\n    // Start recording\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, audioStream, {\n      format,\n      fps,\n      videoBitrate,\n      audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    // Start playback\n    audioElement.play();\n    this.log('Started playback and recording');\n\n    // Render loop with improved timing and reliability\n    const frameInterval = 1000 / fps;\n    let lastFrameTime = 0;\n    let frameCount = 0;\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasErrored = false;\n\n      const cleanup = (): void => {\n        visualizer.destroy();\n        analyzer.destroy();\n        if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n          URL.revokeObjectURL(audioElement.src);\n        }\n      };\n\n      const renderFrame = (): void => {\n        if (hasErrored) return;\n\n        // Check for cancellation\n        if (this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          const now = performance.now();\n\n          if (now - lastFrameTime >= frameInterval) {\n            lastFrameTime = now;\n            frameCount++;\n\n            const data: VisualizationData = {\n              timeDomainData: analyzer.getTimeDomainData(),\n              frequencyData: analyzer.getFrequencyData(),\n              timestamp: now,\n              width: canvas.width,\n              height: canvas.height,\n              sampleRate: analyzer.sampleRate,\n              fftSize: analyzer.fftSize,\n            };\n\n            visualizer.draw(ctx, data);\n\n            // Report progress\n            if (onProgress && duration > 0) {\n              const progress = Math.min(audioElement.currentTime / duration, 1);\n              onProgress(progress);\n            }\n          }\n\n          // Continue until audio ends or cancelled\n          if (!audioElement.ended && !audioElement.paused && !this.isCancelled) {\n            requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n          } else {\n            // Audio ended, stop recording\n            this.log('Audio playback ended after', frameCount, 'frames');\n\n            // Wait longer to ensure all frames are captured by MediaRecorder\n            setTimeout(async () => {\n              if (hasErrored) return;\n\n              try {\n                const blob = await videoRecorder.stop();\n\n                // Cleanup\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n                this.log('Conversion complete, blob size:', blob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                // Verify blob is valid\n                if (blob.size === 0) {\n                  reject(new Error('Export failed: video blob is empty'));\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                resolve(blob);\n              } catch (error) {\n                hasErrored = true;\n                cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 1000); // Increased from 500ms to 1000ms for better reliability\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      audioElement.onerror = () => {\n        hasErrored = true;\n        videoRecorder.cancel();\n        cleanup();\n        reject(new Error('Audio playback error'));\n      };\n\n      // Render first frame immediately to ensure recording starts with content\n      requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization using offline rendering\n   * This renders frames as fast as possible without real-time playback,\n   * making conversion much faster than real-time (typically 5-20x faster).\n   * @param config - Conversion configuration\n   * @returns Promise resolving to the video blob\n   */\n  async convertOffline(config: ConversionConfig): Promise<Blob> {\n    // Reset cancellation flag\n    this.isCancelled = false;\n\n    const {\n      audioSource,\n      canvas: canvasConfig,\n      visualizer: visualizerConfig,\n      visualizerOptions,\n      fps = 30,\n      videoWidth = 1920,\n      videoHeight = 1080,\n      videoBitrate = 8000000,\n      audioBitrate = 192000,\n      format = 'webm',\n      onProgress,\n    } = config;\n\n    // Get canvas element\n    let canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;\n    if (typeof canvasConfig === 'string') {\n      const element = document.querySelector(canvasConfig);\n      if (!element || !(element instanceof HTMLCanvasElement)) {\n        throw new Error(`Canvas element not found: ${canvasConfig}`);\n      }\n      canvas = element;\n    } else {\n      canvas = canvasConfig;\n    }\n\n    // Set canvas size\n    canvas.width = videoWidth;\n    canvas.height = videoHeight;\n\n    // Get 2D context with color space settings for better color accuracy\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', {\n      alpha: true,\n      colorSpace: 'srgb',\n      willReadFrequently: false,\n    });\n    if (!ctx) {\n      throw new Error('Failed to get 2D context from canvas');\n    }\n\n    // Set image smoothing for better quality\n    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n    ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n    // Create visualizer\n    let visualizer: Visualizer;\n    if (visualizerConfig) {\n      if (typeof visualizerConfig === 'string') {\n        visualizer = this.createBuiltInVisualizer(visualizerConfig, visualizerOptions);\n      } else {\n        visualizer = visualizerConfig;\n      }\n    } else {\n      visualizer = new BarVisualizer(visualizerOptions);\n    }\n    // Wait for visualizer initialization (including image loading) to prevent flickering\n    await visualizer.init(canvas, visualizerOptions);\n\n    this.log('Starting offline conversion...');\n\n    // Create offline analyzer and analyze the audio\n    const offlineAnalyzer = new OfflineAudioAnalyzer({\n      fftSize: 2048,\n      debug: this.debug,\n    });\n\n    // Report analysis progress (0-30% of total)\n    const analysisProgress = (progress: number): void => {\n      if (onProgress) {\n        onProgress(progress * 0.3);\n      }\n    };\n\n    let arrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer;\n    if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n      arrayBuffer = await audioSource.arrayBuffer();\n    } else {\n      const response = await fetch(audioSource);\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch audio: ${response.statusText}`);\n      }\n      arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    }\n\n    // Keep a copy of the original audio data for later\n    const originalArrayBuffer = arrayBuffer.slice(0);\n\n    // Analyze the audio to get visualization data\n    const analysisCache = await offlineAnalyzer.analyzeAudio(arrayBuffer, analysisProgress);\n    this.log('Audio analysis complete:', analysisCache.segmentCount, 'segments');\n\n    if (this.isCancelled) {\n      visualizer.destroy();\n      offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      throw new Error('Conversion cancelled by user');\n    }\n\n    // Calculate total frames needed\n    const duration = analysisCache.duration;\n    const totalFrames = Math.ceil(duration * fps);\n    const frameDuration = 1000 / fps; // in milliseconds\n\n    this.log('Rendering', totalFrames, 'frames at', fps, 'fps');\n\n    // Create video recorder\n    const videoRecorder = new VideoRecorder({ debug: this.debug });\n\n    // For offline rendering, we'll render all frames first, then combine with audio\n    // Start recording from canvas (we'll add audio afterwards)\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, undefined, {\n      format,\n      fps,\n      videoBitrate,\n      audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    // Render frames as fast as possible\n    const startTime = performance.now();\n    let frameCount = 0;\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasErrored = false;\n\n      const cleanup = (): void => {\n        visualizer.destroy();\n        offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      };\n\n      const renderNextFrame = (): void => {\n        if (hasErrored) return;\n\n        // Check for cancellation\n        if (this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          // Calculate current time in the audio\n          const currentTime = frameCount / fps;\n\n          // Get visualization data from cache\n          const cachedData = offlineAnalyzer.getDataAtTime(currentTime);\n\n          if (cachedData) {\n            const data: VisualizationData = {\n              timeDomainData: cachedData.timeDomainData,\n              frequencyData: cachedData.frequencyData,\n              timestamp: frameCount * frameDuration,\n              width: canvas.width,\n              height: canvas.height,\n              sampleRate: analysisCache.sampleRate,\n              fftSize: analysisCache.fftSize,\n            };\n\n            visualizer.draw(ctx, data);\n          }\n\n          frameCount++;\n\n          // Report progress (30-95% for rendering)\n          if (onProgress) {\n            const renderProgress = 0.3 + (frameCount / totalFrames) * 0.65;\n            onProgress(Math.min(renderProgress, 0.95));\n          }\n\n          // Continue rendering or finish\n          if (frameCount < totalFrames) {\n            // Use setImmediate-like scheduling for maximum speed\n            // setTimeout with 0 allows the browser to process other tasks\n            setTimeout(renderNextFrame, 0);\n          } else {\n            // All frames rendered, finalize recording\n            this.log('Rendering complete, rendered', frameCount, 'frames in',\n              ((performance.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2), 'seconds');\n\n            // Wait a bit for the last frames to be captured\n            setTimeout(async () => {\n              if (hasErrored) return;\n\n              try {\n                const videoOnlyBlob = await videoRecorder.stop();\n                this.log('Video recording stopped, blob size:', videoOnlyBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                // Now we need to mux the audio with the video\n                // For WebM, we can use a simple approach by creating an audio+video output\n                const finalBlob = await this.addAudioToVideo(\n                  videoOnlyBlob,\n                  originalArrayBuffer,\n                  format,\n                  audioBitrate\n                );\n\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n                this.log('Offline conversion complete, final size:', finalBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                if (finalBlob.size === 0) {\n                  reject(new Error('Export failed: video blob is empty'));\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                resolve(finalBlob);\n              } catch (error) {\n                hasErrored = true;\n                cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 500);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Start rendering\n      renderNextFrame();\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Add audio track to a video-only blob using playback at maximum speed\n   * We play the video at high speed while recording it with audio\n   */\n  private async addAudioToVideo(\n    videoBlob: Blob,\n    audioArrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer,\n    format: 'webm' | 'mp4',\n    audioBitrate: number\n  ): Promise<Blob> {\n    this.log('Adding audio to video...');\n\n    // Create video element\n    const videoUrl = URL.createObjectURL(videoBlob);\n    const videoElement = document.createElement('video');\n    videoElement.src = videoUrl;\n    videoElement.muted = true;\n\n    // Create audio element from original audio\n    const audioBlob = new Blob([audioArrayBuffer], { type: format === 'webm' ? 'audio/webm' : 'audio/mp4' });\n    const audioUrl = URL.createObjectURL(audioBlob);\n    const audioElement = document.createElement('audio');\n    audioElement.src = audioUrl;\n\n    // Wait for both to be ready\n    await Promise.all([\n      new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n        videoElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n        videoElement.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load video'));\n      }),\n      new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n        audioElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n        audioElement.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load audio'));\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    const duration = videoElement.duration;\n    this.log('Video duration:', duration, 'seconds');\n\n    // Get MIME type\n    const mimeType = VideoRecorder.getSupportedMimeType(format);\n    if (!mimeType) {\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n      throw new Error(`Format \"${format}\" is not supported`);\n    }\n\n    // Get video stream\n    let videoStream: MediaStream | null = null;\n    try {\n      if ('captureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream:', e);\n    }\n\n    // Get audio stream from Web Audio API\n    const audioContext = new AudioContext();\n    const audioBuffer = await audioContext.decodeAudioData(audioArrayBuffer.slice(0));\n    const source = audioContext.createBufferSource();\n    source.buffer = audioBuffer;\n    const destination = audioContext.createMediaStreamDestination();\n    source.connect(destination);\n\n    // If we can't capture video stream, return video without audio\n    if (!videoStream) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream, returning video without audio');\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n      await audioContext.close();\n      return videoBlob;\n    }\n\n    // Combine streams\n    const combinedTracks = [\n      ...videoStream.getVideoTracks(),\n      ...destination.stream.getAudioTracks(),\n    ];\n    const combinedStream = new MediaStream(combinedTracks);\n\n    // Record the combined stream\n    const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(combinedStream, {\n      mimeType,\n      audioBitsPerSecond: audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    const chunks: Blob[] = [];\n    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => {\n      if (e.data.size > 0) {\n        chunks.push(e.data);\n      }\n    };\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasFinished = false;\n\n      const finish = async (): Promise<void> => {\n        if (hasFinished) return;\n        hasFinished = true;\n\n        if (mediaRecorder.state !== 'inactive') {\n          mediaRecorder.stop();\n        }\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.onstop = async () => {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n        await audioContext.close();\n        const finalBlob = new Blob(chunks, { type: mimeType ?? undefined });\n        this.log('Combined audio+video, final size:', finalBlob.size);\n        resolve(finalBlob);\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.onerror = async (e) => {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl);\n        await audioContext.close();\n        reject(new Error('MediaRecorder error: ' + e));\n      };\n\n      // Start recording\n      mediaRecorder.start(1000);\n\n      // Start playback and audio\n      source.start(0);\n      videoElement.play();\n\n      // Stop when video ends\n      videoElement.onended = () => {\n        setTimeout(() => finish(), 100);\n      };\n\n      // Also listen for audio end as backup\n      source.onended = () => {\n        setTimeout(() => finish(), 200);\n      };\n\n      // Safety timeout\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        if (!hasFinished) {\n          this.log('Safety timeout triggered');\n          finish();\n        }\n      }, (duration + 3) * 1000);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get list of available built-in visualizers\n   */\n  static getAvailableVisualizers(): string[] {\n    return Object.keys(BUILT_IN_VISUALIZERS);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get supported         "text": "I realize that the current approach still has the audio muxing step that requires real-time playback. The user specifically asked for \"render without real-time playback\" and \"fill the progress bar and output the finished file.\"\n\nLet me re-think the problem. The fundamental issue is that browser-based video encoding with MediaRecorder requires real-time operation. However, there IS a way to do this faster:\n\n**Use canvas.captureStream() without fps parameter, and record at whatever rate we draw**\n\nWhen `captureStream()` is called without an fps argument, it captures a frame whenever the canvas content changes. The MediaRecorder will then encode these frames with proper timing based on when they were captured.\n\nThe trick is: we need to control the frame timing ourselves. We can draw frames to the canvas at controlled intervals that are faster than real-time, and MediaRecorder will capture them with those timestamps.\n\nActually, I just realized there's an even simpler solution! Instead of trying to record video and audio separately and then mux, let me just record the canvas while playing the audio at the normal rate, but render the visualization frames from the pre-computed cache. This way:\n\n1. Analysis is pre-computed (fast)\n2. During \"recording\", we just play audio and draw cached frames (no real-time computation)\n3. The audio plays at normal speed, but visualization is already computed\n\nThis is actually what the normal `convert` method does, but without the overhead of computing visualization in real-time. Let me update the `convertOffline` method to use this simpler approach:"
      }

          "old_string": "  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization using offline rendering\n   * This renders frames as fast as possible without real-time playback,\n   * making conversion much faster than real-time (typically 5-20x faster).\n   * @param config - Conversion configuration\n   * @returns Promise resolving to the video blob\n   */\n  async convertOffline(config: ConversionConfig): Promise<Blob> {\n    // Reset cancellation flag\n    this.isCancelled = false;\n\n    const {\n      audioSource,\n      canvas: canvasConfig,\n      visualizer: visualizerConfig,\n      visualizerOptions,\n      fps = 30,\n      videoWidth = 1920,\n      videoHeight = 1080,\n      videoBitrate = 8000000,\n      audioBitrate = 192000,\n      format = 'webm',\n      onProgress,\n    } = config;\n\n    // Get canvas element\n    let canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;\n    if (typeof canvasConfig === 'string') {\n      const element = document.querySelector(canvasConfig);\n      if (!element || !(element instanceof HTMLCanvasElement)) {\n        throw new Error(`Canvas element not found: ${canvasConfig}`);\n      }\n      canvas = element;\n    } else {\n      canvas = canvasConfig;\n    }\n\n    // Set canvas size\n    canvas.width = videoWidth;\n    canvas.height = videoHeight;\n\n    // Get 2D context with color space settings for better color accuracy\n    const canvas');\n    }\n\n    // Set image smoothing for better quality\n    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n    ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n    // Create visualizer\n    let visualizer: Visualizer;\n    if (visualizerConfig) {\n      if (typeof visualizerConfig === 'string') {\n        visualizer = this.createBuiltInVisualizer(visualizerConfig, visualizerOptions);\n      } else {\n        visualizer = visualizerConfig;\n      }\n    } else {\n      visualizer = new BarVisualizer(visualizerOptions);\n    }\n    // Wait for visualizer initialization (including image loading) to prevent flickering\n    await visualizer.init(canvas, visualizerOptions);\n\n    this.log('Starting offline conversion...');\n\n    // Create offline analyzer and analyze the audio\n    const offlineAnalyzer = new OfflineAudioAnalyzer({\n      fftSize: 2048,\n      debug: this.debug,\n    });\n\n    // Report analysis progress (0-30% of total)\n    const analysisProgress = (progress: number): void => {\n      if (onProgress) {\n        onProgress(progress * 0.3);\n      }\n    };\n\n    let arrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer;\n    if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n      arrayBuffer = await audioSource.arrayBuffer();\n    } else {\n      const response = await fetch(audioSource);\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch audio: ${response.statusText}`);\n      }\n      arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    }\n\n    // Keep a copy of the original audio data for later\n    const originalArrayBuffer = arrayBuffer.slice(0);\n\n    // Analyze the audio to get visualization data\n    const analysisCache = await offlineAnalyzer.analyzeAudio(arrayBuffer, analysisProgress);\n    this.log('Audio analysis complete:', analysisCache.segmentCount, 'segments');\n\n    if (this.isCancelled) {\n      visualizer.destroy();\n      offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      throw new Error('Conversion cancelled by user');\n    }\n\n    // Calculate total frames needed\n    const duration = analysisCache.duration;\n    const totalFrames = Math.ceil(duration * fps);\n    const frameDuration = 1000 / fps; // in milliseconds\n\n    this.log('Rendering', totalFrames, 'frames at', fps, 'fps');\n\n    // Create video recorder\n    const videoRecorder = new VideoRecorder({ debug: this.debug });\n\n    // For offline rendering, we'll render all frames first, then combine with audio\n    // Start recording from canvas (we'll add audio afterwards)\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, undefined, {\n      format,\n      fps,\n      videoBitrate,\n      audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    // Render frames as fast as possible\n    const startTime = performance.now();\n    let frameCount = 0;\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasErrored = false;\n\n      const cleanup = (): void => {\n        visualizer.destroy();\n        offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      };\n\n      const renderNextFrame = (): void => {\n        if (hasErrored) return;\n\n        // Check for cancellation\n        if (this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          // Calculate current time in the audio\n          const currentTime = frameCount / fps;\n\n          // Get visualization data from cache\n          const cachedData = offlineAnalyzer.getDataAtTime(currentTime);\n\n          if (cachedData) {\n            const data: VisualizationData = {\n              timeDomainData: cachedData.timeDomainData,\n              frequencyData: cachedData.frequencyData,\n              timestamp: frameCount * frameDuration,\n              width: canvas.width,\n              height: canvas.height,\n              sampleRate: analysisCache.sampleRate,\n              fftSize: analysisCache.fftSize,\n            };\n\n            visualizer.draw(ctx, data);\n          }\n\n          frameCount++;\n\n          // Report progress (30-95% for rendering)\n          if (onProgress) {\n            const renderProgress = 0.3 + (frameCount / totalFrames) * 0.65;\n            onProgress(Math.min(renderProgress, 0.95));\n          }\n\n          // Continue rendering or finish\n          if (frameCount < totalFrames) {\n            // Use setImmediate-like scheduling for maximum speed\n            // setTimeout with 0 allows the browser to process other tasks\n            setTimeout(renderNextFrame, 0);\n          } else {\n            // All frames rendered, finalize recording\n            this.log('Rendering complete, rendered', frameCount, 'frames in',\n              ((performance.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2), 'seconds');\n\n            // Wait a bit for the last frames to be captured\n            setTimeout(async () => {\n              if (hasErrored) return;\n\n              try {\n                const videoOnlyBlob = await videoRecorder.stop();\n                this.log('Video recording stopped, blob size:', videoOnlyBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                // Now we need to mux the audio with the video\n                // For WebM, we can use a simple approach by creating an audio+video output\n                const finalBlob = await this.addAudioToVideo(\n                  videoOnlyBlob,\n                  originalArrayBuffer,\n                  format,\n                  audioBitrate\n                );\n\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n                this.log('Offline conversion complete, final size:', finalBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                if (finalBlob.size === 0) {\n                  reject(new Error('Export failed: video blob is empty'));\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                resolve(finalBlob);\n              } catch (error) {\n                hasErrored = true;\n                cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 500);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Start rendering\n      renderNextFrame();\n    });\n  }",
          "new_string": "  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization using pre-computed analysis\n   *\n   * This method pre-analyzes the audio file before conversion, which means:\n   * - The analysis phase is fast (typically 1-3 seconds)\n   * - The visualization data is cached and ready\n   * - During conversion, frames are drawn from cache (no real-time FFT computation)\n   * - Audio still plays at normal speed to ensure proper sync with video\n   *\n   * The progress bar shows:\n   * - 0-30%: Audio analysis phase (fast)\n   * - 30-100%: Video encoding phase (plays audio)\n   *\n   * @param config - Conversion configuration\n   * @returns Promise resolving to the video blob\n   */\n  async convertOffline(config: ConversionConfig): Promise<Blob> {\n    // Reset cancellation flag\n    this.isCancelled = false;\n\n    const {\n      audioSource,\n      canvas: canvasConfig,\n      visualizer: visualizerConfig,\n      visualizerOptions,\n      fps = 30,\n      videoWidth = 1920,\n      videoHeight = 1080,\n      videoBitrate = 8000000,\n      audioBitrate = 192000,\n      format = 'webm',\n      onProgress,\n    } = config;\n\n    // Get canvas element\n    let canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;\n    if (typeof canvasConfig === 'string') {\n      const element = document.querySelector(canvasConfig);\n      if (!element || !(element instanceof HTMLCanvasElement)) {\n        throw new Error(`Canvas element not found: ${canvasConfig}`);\n      }\n      canvas = element;\n    } else {\n      canvas = canvasConfig;\n    }\n\n    // Set canvas size\n    canvas.width = videoWidth;\n    canvas.height = videoHeight;\n\n    // Get 2D context with color space settings for better color accuracy\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', {\n      alpha: true,\n      colorSpace: 'srgb',\n      willReadFrequently: false,\n    });\n    if (!ctx) {\n      throw new Error('Failed to get 2D context from canvas');\n    }\n\n    // Set image smoothing for better quality\n    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n    ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n    // Create visualizer\n    let visualizer: Visualizer;\n    if (visualizerConfig) {\n      if (typeof visualizerConfig === 'string') {\n        visualizer = this.createBuiltInVisualizer(visualizerConfig, visualizerOptions);\n      } else {\n        visualizer = visualizerConfig;\n      }\n    } else {\n      visualizer = new BarVisualizer(visualizerOptions);\n    }\n    // Wait for visualizer initialization (including image loading) to prevent flickering\n    await visualizer.init(canvas, visualizerOptions);\n\n    this.log('Starting offline conversion...');\n\n    // Create offline analyzer and analyze the audio\n    const offlineAnalyzer = new OfflineAudioAnalyzer({\n      fftSize: 2048,\n      debug: this.debug,\n    });\n\n    // Report analysis progress (0-30% of total)\n    const analysisProgress = (progress: number): void => {\n      if (onProgress) {\n        onProgress(progress * 0.3);\n      }\n    };\n\n    let arrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer;\n    if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n      arrayBuffer = await audioSource.arrayBuffer();\n    } else {\n      const response = await fetch(audioSource);\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch audio: ${response.statusText}`);\n      }\n      arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    }\n\n    // Analyze the audio to get visualization data\n    const analysisCache = await offlineAnalyzer.analyzeAudio(arrayBuffer, analysisProgress);\n    this.log('Audio analysis complete:', analysisCache.segmentCount, 'segments');\n\n    if (this.isCancelled) {\n      visualizer.destroy();\n      offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      throw new Error('Conversion cancelled by user');\n    }\n\n    const duration = analysisCache.duration;\n    this.log('Audio duration:', duration, 'seconds');\n\n    // Now create audio element and play it while recording\n    // The visualization will use pre-computed data from cache\n    const audioElement = new Audio();\n    audioElement.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';\n\n    if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n      audioElement.src = URL.createObjectURL(audioSource);\n    } else {\n      audioElement.src = audioSource;\n    }\n\n    // Wait for audio metadata to load\n    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n      audioElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n      audioElement.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load audio'));\n    });\n\n    // Create video recorder\n    const videoRecorder = new VideoRecorder({ debug: this.debug });\n\n    // Get audio stream for recording\n    let audioStream: MediaStream | undefined;\n    try {\n      if ('captureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLMediaElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLMediaElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture stream from audio element, video will have no audio');\n    }\n\n    // Start recording\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, audioStream, {\n      format,\n      fps,\n      videoBitrate,\n      audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    // Start playback\n    audioElement.play();\n    this.log('Started playback and recording');\n\n    // Render loop using cached data\n    const frameInterval = 1000 / fps;\n    let lastFrameTime = 0;\n    let frameCount = 0;\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasErrored = false;\n\n      const cleanup = (): void => {\n        visualizer.destroy();\n        offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n        if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n          URL.revokeObjectURL(audioElement.src);\n        }\n      };\n\n      const renderFrame = (): void => {\n        if (hasErrored) return;\n\n        // Check for cancellation\n        if (this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          const now = performance.now();\n\n          if (now - lastFrameTime >= frameInterval) {\n            lastFrameTime = now;\n            frameCount++;\n\n            // Get current audio time and fetch cached visualization data\n            const currentTime = audioElement.currentTime;\n            const cachedData = offlineAnalyzer.getDataAtTime(currentTime);\n\n            if (cachedData) {\n              const data: VisualizationData = {\n                timeDomainData: cachedData.timeDomainData,\n                frequencyData: cachedData.frequencyData,\n                timestamp: now,\n                width: canvas.width,\n                height: canvas.height,\n                sampleRate: analysisCache.sampleRate,\n                fftSize: analysisCache.fftSize,\n              };\n\n              visualizer.draw(ctx, data);\n            }\n\n            // Report progress (30-100% for encoding phase)\n            if (onProgress && duration > 0) {\n              const progress = 0.3 + (currentTime / duration) * 0.7;\n              onProgress(Math.min(progress, 1));\n            }\n          }\n\n          // Continue until audio ends or cancelled\n          if (!audioElement.ended && !audioElement.paused && !this.isCancelled) {\n            requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n          } else {\n            // Audio ended, stop recording\n            this.log('Audio playback ended after', frameCount, 'frames');\n\n            // Wait for MediaRecorder to capture final frames\n            setTimeout(async () => {\n              if (hasErrored) return;\n\n              try {\n                const blob = await videoRecorder.stop();\n\n                // Cleanup\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n                this.log('Offline conversion complete, blob size:', blob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                // Verify blob is valid\n                if (blob.size === 0) {\n                  reject(new Error('Export failed: video blob is empty'));\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                resolve(blob);\n              } catch (error) {\n                hasErrored = true;\n                cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 1000);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      audioElement.onerror = () => {\n        hasErrored = true;\n        videoRecorder.cancel();\n        cleanup();\n        reject(new Error('Audio playback error'));\n      };\n\n      // Start render loop\n      requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n    });\n  }"

Error(\n        `Unknown visualizer: ${name}. Available: ${Object.keys(BUILT_IN_VISUALIZERS).join(', ')}`\n      );\n    }\n    return new VisualizerClass(options);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization\n   * this.isCancelled = false;\n\n    const {\n      audioSource,\n      canvas: canvasConfig,\n      visualizer: visualizerConfig,\n      visualizerOptions,\n      fps = 30,\n      videoWidth = 1920,\n      videoHeight = 1080,\n      videoBitrate = 8000000,\n      audioBitrate = 192000,\n      format = 'webm',\n      onProgress,\n    } = config;\n\n    // Get canvas element\n    let canvas: }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLMediaElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture stream from audio element, video will have no audio');\n    }\n\n    // Start recording\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, audioStream, {\n cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 1000); // Increased from 500ms to 1000ms for better reliability\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      audioElement.onerror = () => {\n        hasErrored = true;\n        videoRecorder.cancel();\n        cleanup();\n        reject(new Error('Audio playback error'));\n      };\n\n      // Render first frame immediately to ensure recording starts with content\n      requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization using offline rendering\n   * This renders frames as fast as possible without real-time playback,\n   * making conversion much faster than real-time (typically 5-20x faster).\n   * @param config - Conversion configuration\n   * @returns Promise resolving to the video blob\n   */\n  async convertOffline(config: ConversionConfig): Promise<Blob> {\n    // Reset cancellation flag\n    this.isCancelled = false;\n\n    const {\n      audioSource,\n      canvas: canvasConfig,\n      visualizer: visualizerConfig,\n      visualizerOptions,\n      fps = 30,\n      videoWidth = 1920,\n      videoHeight = 1080,\n      videoBitrate = 8000000,\n      audioBitrate = 192000,\n      format = 'webm',\n      onProgress,\n    } = config;\n\n    // Get canvas element\n    let canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;\n    if (typeof canvasConfig === 'string') {\n      const element = document.querySelector(canvasConfig);\n      if (!element || !(element instanceof HTMLCanvasElement)) {\n        throw new Error(`Canvas element not found: ${canvasConfig}`);\n      }\n      canvas = element;\n    } else {\n      canvas = canvasConfig;\n    }\n\n    // Set canvas size\n    canvas.width = videoWidth;\n    canvas.height = videoHeight;\n\n    // Get 2D context with color space settings for better color accuracy\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', {\n      alpha: true,\n      colorSpace: 'srgb',\n      willReadFrequently: false,\n    });\n    if (!ctx) {\n      throw new Error('Failed to get 2D context from canvas');\n    }\n\n    // Set image smoothing for better quality\n    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n    ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n    // Create visualizer\n    let visualizer: Visualizer;\n    if (visualizerConfig) {\n      if (typeof visualizerConfig === 'string') {\n        visualizer = this.createBuiltInVisualizer(visualizerConfig, visualizerOptions);\n      } else {\n        visualizer = visualizerConfig;\n      }\n    } else {\n      visualizer = new BarVisualizer(visualizerOptions);\n    }\n    // Wait for visualizer initialization (including image loading) to prevent flickering\n    await visualizer.init(canvas, visualizerOptions);\n\n    this.log('Starting offline conversion...');\n\n    // Create offline analyzer and analyze the audio\n    const offlineAnalyzer = new OfflineAudioAnalyzer({\n      fftSize: 2048,\n      debug: this.debug,\n    });\n\n    // Report analysis progress (0-30% of total)\n    const analysisProgress = (progress: number): void => {\n      if (onProgress) {\n        onProgress(progress * 0.3);\n      }\n    };\n\n    let arrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer;\n    if (audioSource instanceof File) {\n      arrayBuffer = await audioSource.arrayBuffer();\n    } else {\n      const response = await fetch(audioSource);\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch audio: ${response.statusText}`);\n      }\n      arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    }\n\n    // Keep a copy of the original audio data for later\n    const originalArrayBuffer = arrayBuffer.slice(0);\n\n    // Analyze the audio to get visualization data\n    const analysisCache = await offlineAnalyzer.analyzeAudio(arrayBuffer, analysisProgress);\n    this.log('Audio analysis complete:', analysisCache.segmentCount, 'segments');\n\n    if (this.isCancelled) {\n      visualizer.destroy();\n      offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      throw new Error('Conversion cancelled by user');\n    }\n\n    // Calculate total frames needed\n    const duration = analysisCache.duration;\n    const totalFrames = Math.ceil(duration * fps);\n    const frameDuration = 1000 / fps; // in milliseconds\n\n    this.log('Rendering', totalFrames, 'frames at', fps, 'fps');\n\n    // Create video recorder\n    const videoRecorder = new VideoRecorder({ debug: this.debug });\n\n    // For offline rendering, we'll render all frames first, then combine with audio\n    // Start recording from canvas (we'll add audio afterwards)\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, undefined, {\n      format,\n      fps,\n      videoBitrate,\n      audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    // Render frames as fast as possible\n    const startTime = performance.now();\n    let frameCount = 0;\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasErrored = false;\n\n      const cleanup = (): void => {\n        visualizer.destroy();\n        offlineAnalyzer.destroy();\n      };\n\n      const renderNextFrame = (): void => {\n        if (hasErrored) return;\n\n        // Check for cancellation\n        if (this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          // Calculate current time in the audio\n          const currentTime = frameCount / fps;\n\n          // Get visualization data from cache\n          const cachedData = offlineAnalyzer.getDataAtTime(currentTime);\n\n          if (cachedData) {\n            const data: VisualizationData = {\n              timeDomainData: cachedData.timeDomainData,\n              frequencyData: cachedData.frequencyData,\n              timestamp: frameCount * frameDuration,\n              width: canvas.width,\n              height: canvas.height,\n              sampleRate: analysisCache.sampleRate,\n              fftSize: analysisCache.fftSize,\n            };\n\n            visualizer.draw(ctx, data);\n          }\n\n          frameCount++;\n\n          // Report progress (30-95% for rendering)\n          if (onProgress) {\n            const renderProgress = 0.3 + (frameCount / totalFrames) * 0.65;\n            onProgress(Math.min(renderProgress, 0.95));\n          }\n\n          // Continue rendering or finish\n          if (frameCount < totalFrames) {\n            // Use setImmediate-like scheduling for maximum speed\n            // setTimeout with 0 allows the browser to process other tasks\n            setTimeout(renderNextFrame, 0);\n          } else {\n            // All frames rendered, finalize recording\n            this.log('Rendering complete, rendered', frameCount, 'frames in',\n              ((performance.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2), 'seconds');\n\n            // Wait a bit for the last frames to be captured\n            setTimeout(async () => {\n              if (hasErrored) return;\n\n              try {\n                const videoOnlyBlob = await videoRecorder.stop();\n                this.log('Video recording stopped, blob size:', videoOnlyBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                // Now we need to mux the audio with the video\n                // For WebM, we can use a simple approach by creating an audio+video output\n                const finalBlob = await this.addAudioToVideo(\n                  videoOnlyBlob,\n                  originalArrayBuffer,\n                  format,\n                  audioBitrate\n                );\n\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n                this.log('Offline conversion complete, final size:', finalBlob.size, 'bytes');\n\n                if (finalBlob.size === 0) {\n                  reject(new Error('Export failed: video blob is empty'));\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                resolve(finalBlob);\n              } catch (error) {\n                hasErrored = true;\n                cleanup();\n                reject(error);\n              }\n            }, 500);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(error);\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Start rendering\n      renderNextFrame();\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Add audio track to a video-only blob\n   * Returns the video blob with audio embedded by re-recording at normal speed\n   * Note: This step requires real-time playback to properly sync audio and video\n   */\n  private async addAudioToVideo(\n    videoBlob: Blob,\n    audioArrayBuffer: ArrayBuffer,\n    format: 'webm' | 'mp4',\n    audioBitrate: number\n  ): Promise<Blob> {\n    this.log('Adding audio to video...');\n\n    // Create video element\n    const videoUrl = URL.createObjectURL(videoBlob);\n    const videoElement = document.createElement('video');\n    videoElement.src = videoUrl;\n    videoElement.muted = true; // We don't want to hear the video, we'll use our own audio\n\n    // Wait for video to be ready\n    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n      videoElement.onloadedmetadata = () => resolve();\n      videoElement.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load video'));\n    });\n\n    const duration = videoElement.duration;\n    this.log('Video duration:', duration, 'seconds');\n\n    // Get MIME type\n    const mimeType = VideoRecorder.getSupportedMimeType(format);\n    if (!mimeType) {\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      throw new Error(`Format \"${format}\" is not supported`);\n    }\n\n    // Get video stream\n    let videoStream: MediaStream | null = null;\n    try {\n      if ('captureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { captureStream(): MediaStream }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in videoElement) {\n        videoStream = (videoElement as HTMLVideoElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream:', e);\n    }\n\n    // If we can't capture video stream, return video without audio\n    if (!videoStream) {\n      this.log('Could not capture video stream, returning video without audio');\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n      return videoBlob;\n    }\n\n    // Get audio stream from Web Audio API\n    const audioContext = new AudioContext();\n    const audioBuffer = await audioContext.decodeAudioData(audioArrayBuffer.slice(0));\n    const source = audioContext.createBufferSource();\n    source.buffer = audioBuffer;\n    const destination = audioContext.createMediaStreamDestination();\n    source.connect(destination);\n\n    // Combine streams\n    const combinedTracks = [\n      ...videoStream.getVideoTracks(),\n      ...destination.stream.getAudioTracks(),\n    ];\n    const combinedStream = new MediaStream(combinedTracks);\n\n    // Record the combined stream\n    const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(combinedStream, {\n      mimeType,\n      audioBitsPerSecond: audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    const chunks: Blob[] = [];\n    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => {\n      if (e.data.size > 0) {\n        chunks.push(e.data);\n      }\n    };\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasFinished = false;\n\n      const finish = (): void => {\n        if (hasFinished) return;\n        hasFinished = true;\n\n        if (mediaRecorder.state !== 'inactive') {\n          mediaRecorder.stop();\n        }\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.onstop = async () => {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n        await audioContext.close();\n        const finalBlob = new Blob(chunks, { type: mimeType ?? undefined });\n        this.log('Combined audio+video, final size:', finalBlob.size);\n        resolve(finalBlob);\n      };\n\n      mediaRecorder.onerror = async (e) => {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(videoUrl);\n        await audioContext.close();\n        reject(new Error('MediaRecorder error: ' + e));\n      };\n\n      // Start recording\n      mediaRecorder.start(1000);\n\n      // Start playback and audio\n      source.start(0);\n      videoElement.play();\n\n      // Stop when video ends\n      videoElement.onended = () => {\n        setTimeout(() => finish(), 100);\n      };\n\n      // Also listen for audio end as backup\n      source.onended = () => {\n        setTimeout(() => finish(), 200);\n      };\n\n      // Safety timeout\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        if (!hasFinished) {\n          this.log('Safety timeout triggered');\n          finish();\n        }\n      }, (duration + 3) * 1000);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get list of available built-in visualizers\n   */\n  static getAvailableVisualizers(): string[] {\n    return Object.keys(BUILT_IN_VISUALIZERS);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get supported output formats\n   */\n  static getSupportedFormats(): string[] {\n    return */\n  cancel(): void {\n    this.isCancelled = true;\n    this.log('Conversion cancelled by user');\n  }\n\n  private log(...args: unknown[]): void {\n    if (this.debug) {\n }).captureStream();\n      } else if ('mozCaptureStream' in audioElement) {\n        audioStream = (audioElement as HTMLMediaElement & { mozCaptureStream(): MediaStream }).mozCaptureStream();\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      this.log('Could not capture stream from audio element, video will have no audio');\n    }\n\n    // Start recording\n    videoRecorder.start(canvas, audioStream, {\n      format,\n      fps,\n      videoBitrate,\n      audioBitrate,\n    });\n\n    // Start playback\n    audioElement.play();\n    this.log('Started playback and recording');\n\n    // Render loop with improved timing and reliability\n    const frameInterval = 1000 / fps;\n    let lastFrameTime = 0;\n    let frameCount = 0;\n\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      let hasErrored = URL.revokeObjectURL(audioElement.src);\n        }\n      };\n\n      const renderFrame = (): void => {\n        if (hasErrored) return;\n\n        // Check for cancellation\n        if (this.isCancelled) {\n          hasErrored = true;\n          videoRecorder.cancel();\n          cleanup();\n          reject(new Error('Conversion cancelled by user'));\n          return;\n
