data);\n\n            // Report progress\n            if (onProgress && duration > 0) {\n              const progress = Math.min(audioElement.currentTime / duration, 1);\n              onProgress(progress);\n            }\n          }\n\n          // Continue until audio ends or cancelled\n          if (!audioElement.ended && !audioElement.paused && !this.isCancelled) {\n videoRecorder.stop();\n\n                // Cleanup\n                cleanup();\n\n                if (onProgress) {\n                  onProgress(1);\n                }\n\n requestAnimationFrame(renderFrame);\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Convert an audio file to video with visualization using pre-computed analysis\n   *\n   * This method pre-analyzes the audio file before conversion, which means:\n   * - The analysis phase is fast (typically 1-3 seconds)\n   * - The visualization data is cached and ready\n   * - During conversion, frames are drawn from cache (no real-time FFT computation)\n   * - Audio still plays at normal speed to ensure proper sync with video\n   *\n   * The progress bar shows:\n   * - 0-30%: Audio analysis phase (fast)\n   * - 30-100%: Video encoding phase (plays audio)\n   *\n   * @param config - Conversion configuration\n   * @returns Promise resolving to the video blob\n   */\n  async convertOffline(config: ConversionConfig):        const saved = localStorage.getItem(ACCORDION_STATE_KEY);\n          if (saved) {\n            return JSON.parse(saved);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.warn('Failed Initialize accordions\n      function initializeAccordions() {\n        const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.settings-section[data-section]');\n        const accordionStates = loadAccordionStates();\n\n        sections.forEach(section => {\n          const sectionName = section.getAttribute('data-section');\n          const header = section.querySelector('.settings-section-header');\n          const isExpanded = accordionStates[sectionName] !== false; // Default to true\n\n          // Set initial state\n          if (isExpanded) header.setAttribute('aria-expanded', wasExpanded);\n\n            // Save state\n            accordionStates[sectionName] = wasExpanded;\n            saveAccordionStates(accordionStates);\n convertTab.style.opacity = '';\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Conversion controls\n        if (!isConverting) {\n          convertBtn.disabled = !audioFile.files.length || isRecording || color: #888; margin-top: 5px;\">Double-click video for fullscreen</p>\n          `;\n\n          // Store blob reference for later use\n          item.dataset.blobUrl = url;\n          item.dataset.fileName = fileName;\n\n          // Add click handler for save button\n          const saveBtn = infoDiv.querySelector('button');\n          saveBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n            try {\n              saveBtn.disabled = true;\n              saveBtn.textContent = 'Saving...';\n\n              const result = await window.electronAPI.saveVideoAndShow(blob, fileName);\n\n              if (result.success) {\n                saveBtn.textContent = 'Saved!';\n                setTimeout(() => {\n                  saveBtn.textContent = 'Save and Show in Folder';\n                  saveBtn.disabled = false;\n                }, 2000);\n              } else if (result.canceled) {\n                saveBtn.textContent = 'Save and Show in Folder';\n                saveBtn.disabled = false;\n              } else {\n                saveBtn.textContent = 'Error - Try Again';\n                saveBtn.disabled = false;\n                console.error('Save error:', result.error);\n              }\n            } catch (error) {\n              console.error('Error saving video:', error);\n              saveBtn.textContent = 'Error - Try Again';\n              saveBtn.disabled = false;\n            }\n          });\n        } else {\n          // Browser: Use regular download link\n          infoDiv.innerHTML = `\n            <p>Recording ${recordingCount}</p>\n            <p>Size: ${(blob.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB</p>\n            <a href=\"${url}\" download=\"${fileName}\">Download</a>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 12px; 's';\n      }\n\n      // Draw waveform on canvas\n      function drawBlinkWaveform(audioBuffer) {\n        const canvas = blinkWaveformCanvas;\n        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n        const width = canvas.width;\n        const height = canvas.height;\n\n        // Clear canvas\n        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Get audio data (use first channel)\n        const channelData = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);\n        const samplesPerPixel = Math.floor(channelData.length / width);\n\n        // Draw waveform\n        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8)';\n        const centerY = height / 2;\n\n        for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {\n          const startSample = x * samplesPerPixel;\n          let min = 1;\n          let max = -1;\n\n          // Find min and max in this segment\n          for (let i = 0; i < samplesPerPixel && startSample + i < channelData.length; i++) {\n            const sample = channelData[startSample + i];\n            if (sample < min) min = sample;\n            if (sample > max) max = sample;\n          }\n\n          // Draw vertical line representing the amplitude range\n          const minY = centerY + min * (height / 2);\n          const maxY = centerY + max * (height / 2);\n          ctx.fillRect(x, maxY, 1, minY - maxY || 1);\n        }\n\n        // Draw center line\n        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)';\n        ctx.beginPath();\n        ctx.moveTo(0, centerY);\n        ctx.lineTo(width, centerY);\n        ctx.stroke();\n      }\n\n      // Update selection overlay position\n      function updateSelectionOverlay() {\n        if (blinkDebugAudioDuration <= 0) return;\n\n        const canvas = blinkWaveformCanvas;\n        const width = canvas.offsetWidth;\n\n        if (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime > 0 || blinkDebugIntervalEndTime > 0) {\n          const startX = (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime / blinkDebugAudioDuration) * width;\n          const endX = (blinkDebugIntervalEndTime / blinkDebugAudioDuration) * width;\n\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.display = 'block';\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.left = startX + 'px';\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.width = (endX - startX) + 'px';\n\n          blinkIntervalDisplay.textContent = `${formatTimeWithDecimals(blinkDebugIntervalStartTime)} - ${formatTimeWithDecimals(blinkDebugIntervalEndTime)}`;\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = false;\n          blinkClearIntervalBtn.disabled = false;\n        } else {\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.display = 'none';\n          blinkIntervalDisplay.textContent = '0.00s - 0.00s';\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = true;\n          blinkClearIntervalBtn.disabled = true;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Analyze audio interval to extract frequency and volume parameters\n      async function analyzeAudioInterval(audioBuffer, startTime, endTime) {\n        if (!audioBuffer || startTime >= endTime) return null;\n\n        const sampleRate = audioBuffer.sampleRate;\n        const channelData = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);\n\n        // Calculate sample indices\n        const startSample = Math.floor(startTime * sampleRate);\n        const endSample = Math.floor(endTime * sampleRate);\n\n        if (startSample >= channelData.length) return null;\n\n        // Extract the interval data\n        const intervalData = channelData.slice(startSample, Math.min(endSample, channelData.length));\n\n        // Calculate RMS volume\n        let sumSquares = 0;\n        let maxAmp = 0;\n        for (let i = 0; i < intervalData.length; i++) {\n          const amp = Math.abs(intervalData[i]);\n          sumSquares += amp * amp;\n          if (amp > maxAmp) maxAmp = amp;\n        }\n        const rms = Math.sqrt(sumSquares / intervalData.length);\n\n        // Convert RMS to 0-255 scale (approximate threshold)\n        const volumeThreshold = Math.round(maxAmp * 255);\n\n        // Perform simple frequency analysis using zero crossing rate\n        // This gives a rough estimate of the dominant frequency\n        let zeroCrossings = 0;\n        for (let i = 1; i < intervalData.length; i++) {\n          if ((intervalData[i] >= 0 && intervalData[i - 1] < 0) ||\n              (intervalData[i] < 0 && intervalData[i - 1] >= 0)) {\n            zeroCrossings++;\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Estimate frequency from zero crossing rate\n        const durationSecs = (endTime - startTime);\n        const estimatedFreq = (zeroCrossings / 2) / durationSecs;\n\n        // Create a reasonable frequency range around the estimated frequency\n        const freqMin = Math.max(20, Math.round(estimatedFreq * 0.5));\n        const freqMax = Math.min(2000, Math.round(estimatedFreq * 1.5));\n\n        return {\n          frequencyMin: freqMin,\n          frequencyMax: freqMax,\n          volumeThreshold: Math.max(50, Math.min(255, volumeThreshold)),\n        };\n      }\n\n      // Update extracted parameters display and apply to visualizer\n      async function updateExtractedParams() {\n        if (!blinkDebugAudioBuffer || blinkDebugIntervalStartTime >= blinkDebugIntervalEndTime) {\n          blinkExtractedParams.style.display = 'none';\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const params = await analyzeAudioInterval(\n          blinkDebugAudioBuffer,\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime,\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime\n        );\n\n        if (params) {\n          blinkExtractedParams.style.display = 'block';\n          blinkExtractedFreq.textContent = `${params.frequencyMin} - ${params.frequencyMax} Hz`;\n          blinkExtractedThreshold.textContent = params.volumeThreshold;\n\n          // Apply the extracted parameters to the visualizer\n          blinkFrequencyMin.value = params.frequencyMin;\n          blinkFrequencyMax.value = params.frequencyMax;\n          blinkThreshold.value = params.volumeThreshold;\n          blinkFrequencyValue.textContent = `${params.frequencyMin} - ${params.frequencyMax}`;\n          blinkThresholdValue.textContent = params.volumeThreshold;\n\n          recorder.setVisualizerOptions(getCurrentOptions());\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Load audio file and create waveform visualization\n      async function loadBlinkDebugAudio(dataUrl) {\n        try {\n          // Create audio context if needed\n          if (!blinkDebugAudioContext) {\n            blinkDebugAudioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();\n          }\n\n          // Decode audio data\n          const response = await fetch(dataUrl);\n          const arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n          blinkDebugAudioBuffer = await blinkDebugAudioContext.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);\n          blinkDebugAudioDuration = blinkDebugAudioBuffer.duration;\n\n          // Draw waveform\n          drawBlinkWaveform(blinkDebugAudioBuffer);\n\n          // Update time labels\n          blinkWaveformStart.textContent = '0:00';\n          blinkWaveformEnd.textContent = formatTime(blinkDebugAudioDuration);\n\n          // Show waveform container\n          blinkWaveformContainer.style.display = 'block';\n\n          // Update selection overlay\n          updateSelectionOverlay();\n\n          // Update extracted params if interval is set\n          if (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime > 0 || blinkDebugIntervalEndTime > 0) {\n            await updateExtractedParams();\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error('Error loading debug audio:', error);\n          blinkWaveformContainer.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Debug mode enable/disable handler\n      blinkDebugModeEnabled.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        const enabled = blinkDebugModeEnabled.checked;\n        blinkDebugControls.style.display = enabled ? 'block' : 'none';\n        blinkManualControls.style.display = enabled ? 'none' : 'block';\n\n        // If enabling and we have saved audio data, load it\n        if (enabled && blinkDebugAudioDataUrl) {\n          loadBlinkDebugAudio(blinkDebugAudioDataUrl);\n        }\n\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Debug audio file input handler\n      blinkDebugAudioFile.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {\n        const file = e.target.files[0];\n        if (!file) return;\n\n        blinkDebugAudioFileName = file.name;\n        blinkDebugFileName.textContent = file.name;\n\n        // Convert to data URL for persistence\n        const reader = new FileReader();\n        reader.onload = async (event) => {\n          blinkDebugAudioDataUrl = event.target.result;\n\n          // Reset interval selection\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = 0;\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = 0;\n\n          // Load and display waveform\n          await loadBlinkDebugAudio(blinkDebugAudioDataUrl);\n\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        };\n        reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n      });\n\n      // Waveform canvas mouse events for interval selection\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n        if (!blinkDebugAudioBuffer) return;\n\n        blinkDebugIsSelecting = true;\n        const rect = blinkWaveformCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n        blinkDebugSelectionStartX = x;\n\n        // Calculate time from x position\n        const width = rect.width;\n        blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = (x / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n        blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = blinkDebugIntervalStartTime;\n\n        updateSelectionOverlay();\n      });\n\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        if (!blinkDebugIsSelecting) return;\n\n        const rect = blinkWaveformCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n        const width = rect.width;\n\n        // Calculate time from x position\n        const currentTime = (x / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n\n        // Update start and end times based on drag direction\n        if (x >= blinkDebugSelectionStartX) {\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = (blinkDebugSelectionStartX / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = currentTime;\n        } else {\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = currentTime;\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = (blinkDebugSelectionStartX / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n        }\n\n        // Clamp values\n        blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = Math.max(0, blinkDebugIntervalStartTime);\n        blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = Math.min(blinkDebugAudioDuration, blinkDebugIntervalEndTime);\n\n        updateSelectionOverlay();\n      });\n\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', async () => {\n        if (blinkDebugIsSelecting) {\n          blinkDebugIsSelecting = false;\n\n          // Analyze the selected interval\n          await updateExtractedParams();\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      });\n\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', async () => {\n        if (blinkDebugIsSelecting) {\n          blinkDebugIsSelecting = false;\n\n          // Analyze the selected interval\n          await updateExtractedParams();\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Play interval button handler\n      blinkPlayIntervalBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        if (!blinkDebugAudioBuffer || !blinkDebugAudioContext) return;\n        if (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime >= blinkDebugIntervalEndTime) return;\n\n        // Stop any existing playback\n        if (blinkDebugAudioSource) {\n          try {\n            blinkDebugAudioSource.stop();\n          } catch (e) {\n            // Ignore if already stopped\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Create new source and play the interval\n        blinkDebugAudioSource = blinkDebugAudioContext.createBufferSource();\n        blinkDebugAudioSource.buffer = blinkDebugAudioBuffer;\n        blinkDebugAudioSource.connect(blinkDebugAudioContext.destination);\n\n        const duration = blinkDebugIntervalEndTime - blinkDebugIntervalStartTime;\n        blinkDebugAudioSource.start(0, blinkDebugIntervalStartTime, duration);\n\n        // Update button text during playback\n        blinkPlayIntervalBtn.textContent = 'Playing...';\n        blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = true;\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.textContent = 'Play Interval';\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = false;\n        }, duration * 1000);\n      });\n\n      // Clear interval button handler\n      blinkClearIntervalBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = 0;\n        blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = 0;\n        blinkExtractedParams.style.display = 'none';\n        updateSelectionOverlay();\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Initialize debug mode from saved settings after page load\n      if (savedSettings.blinkDebugModeEnabled && savedSettings.blinkDebugAudioData) {\n        // Defer loading to allow page to fully initialize\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          loadBlinkDebugAudio(savedSettings.blinkDebugAudioData);\n        }, 500);\n      }\n\n      // ============================================================\n      // End Blink Debug Mode Functionality\n      // ============================================================\n\n      // Image Cropper functionality\n      const cropperModal = document.getElementById('imageCropperModal');\n      const cropperCanvas = document.getElementById('cropperCanvas');\n      const cropperCtx = cropperCanvas.getContext('2d');\n      const cropperZoom = document.getElementById('cropperZoom');\n      const cropperZoomValue = document.getElementById('cropperZoomValue');\n      const closeCropperBtn = document.getElementById('closeCropperBtn');\n      const cancelCropBtn = document.getElementById('cancelCropBtn');\n      const applyCropBtn = document.getElementById('applyCropBtn');\n\n      let cropperImage = null;\n      let cropperScale = 1;\n      let cropperOffsetX = 0;\n      let cropperOffsetY = 0;\n      let isDragging = false;\n      let dragStartX = 0;\n      let dragStartY = 0;\n      let dragStartOffsetX = 0;\n      let dragStartOffsetY = 0;\n\n      function openCropper(imageDataUrl) {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          cropperImage = img;\n          cropperScale = 1;\n          cropperOffsetX = 0;\n          cropperOffsetY = 0;\n          cropperZoom.value = 100;\n          cropperZoomValue.textContent = '100%';\n\n          // Set canvas size to fit container (400x400)\n          cropperCanvas.width = 400;\n          cropperCanvas.height = 400;\n\n          cropperModal.style.display = 'flex';\n          drawCropper();\n        };\n        img.src = imageDataUrl;\n      }\n\n      function closeCropper() {\n        cropperModal.style.display = 'none';\n        cropperImage = null;\n        cropperOffsetX = 0;\n        cropperOffsetY = 0;\n        isDragging = false;\n        // Reset file input\n        centerImage.value = '';\n      }\n\n      function drawCropper() {\n        if (!cropperImage) return;\n\n        cropperCtx.clearRect(0, 0, cropperCanvas.width, cropperCanvas.height);\n        cropperCtx.fillStyle = '#000';\n        cropperCtx.fillRect(0, 0, cropperCanvas.width, cropperCanvas.height);\n\n        // Calculate scaled dimensions\n        const scale = cropperScale;\n        const imgWidth = cropperImage.width * scale;\n        const imgHeight = cropperImage.height * scale;\n\n        // Center the image with offset for dragging\n        const x = (cropperCanvas.width - imgWidth) / 2 + cropperOffsetX;\n        const y = (cropperCanvas.height - imgHeight) / 2 + cropperOffsetY;\n\n        cropperCtx.drawImage(cropperImage, x, y, imgWidth, imgHeight);\n      }\n\n      // Mouse drag handlers for cropper\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n        isDragging = true;\n        dragStartX = e.clientX;\n        dragStartY = e.clientY;\n        dragStartOffsetX = cropperOffsetX;\n        dragStartOffsetY = cropperOffsetY;\n        cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grabbing';\n      });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        if (!isDragging) return;\n        const dx = e.clientX - dragStartX;\n        const dy = e.clientY - dragStartY;\n        cropperOffsetX = dragStartOffsetX + dx;\n        cropperOffsetY = dragStartOffsetY + dy;\n        drawCropper();\n      });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {\n        isDragging = false;\n        cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n      });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {\n        if (isDragging) {\n          isDragging = false;\n          cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Set initial cursor style\n      cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n\n      // Touch support for mobile\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {\n        if (e.touches.length === 1) {\n          isDragging = true;\n          dragStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;\n          dragStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;\n          dragStartOffsetX = cropperOffsetX;\n          dragStartOffsetY = cropperOffsetY;\n          e.preventDefault();\n        }\n      }, { passive: false });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {\n        if (!isDragging || e.touches.length !== 1) return;\n        const dx = e.touches[0].clientX - dragStartX;\n        const dy = e.touches[0].clientY - dragStartY;\n        cropperOffsetX = dragStartOffsetX + dx;\n        cropperOffsetY = dragStartOffsetY + dy;\n        drawCropper();\n        e.preventDefault();\n      }, { passive: false });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {\n        isDragging = false;\n      });\n\n      function applyCrop() {\n        if (!cropperImage) return;\n\n        // Create a temporary canvas for the cropped result\n        // Use high resolution (512x512) to prevent pixelation when displayed in visualizer\n        const resultCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n        const resultCtx = resultCanvas.getContext('2d');\n        const cropSize = 512; // Higher resolution for better quality\n\n        resultCanvas.width = cropSize;\n        resultCanvas.height = cropSize;\n\n        // Enable high-quality image smoothing\n        resultCtx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n        resultCtx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n        // Calculate the source rectangle from the cropper canvas\n        const centerX = cropperCanvas.width / 2;\n        const centerY = cropperCanvas.height / 2;\n        const cropRadius = 100; // Half of display cropSize (200px circle in cropper UI)\n\n        // Get the visible portion parameters (including drag offset)\n        const scale = cropperScale;\n        const imgWidth = cropperImage.width * scale;\n        const imgHeight = cropperImage.height * scale;\n        const imgX = (cropperCanvas.width - imgWidth) / 2 + cropperOffsetX;\n        const imgY = (cropperCanvas.height - imgHeight) / 2 + cropperOffsetY;\n\n        // Calculate source coordinates on the original image\n        const srcCenterX = (centerX - imgX) / scale;\n        const srcCenterY = (centerY - imgY) / scale;\n        const srcRadius = cropRadius / scale;\n\n        // Draw the cropped circular image\n        resultCtx.save();\n        resultCtx.beginPath();\n        resultCtx.arc(cropSize / 2, cropSize / 2, cropSize / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n        resultCtx.clip();\n\n        // Draw image centered in the circle at high resolution\n        resultCtx.drawImage(\n          cropperImage,\n          srcCenterX - srcRadius,\n          srcCenterY - srcRadius,\n          srcRadius * 2,\n          srcRadius * 2,\n          0,\n          0,\n          cropSize,\n          cropSize\n        );\n        resultCtx.restore();\n\n        // Convert to data URL and save with high quality\n        const croppedDataUrl = resultCanvas.toDataURL('image/png', 1.0);\n        currentCenterImageUrl = croppedDataUrl;\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({ custom: { centerImage: croppedDataUrl } });\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n\n        // Show center image position controls since we now have a center image\n        centerImagePositionControls.style.display = 'grid';\n\n        closeCropper();\n        updatePreview();\n      }\n\n      // Cropper zoom handler\n      cropperZoom.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const zoomPercent = parseInt(cropperZoom.value);\n        cropperZoomValue.textContent = zoomPercent + '%';\n        cropperScale = zoomPercent / 100;\n        drawCropper();\n      });\n\n      // Cropper button handlers\n      closeCropperBtn.addEventListener('click', closeCropper);\n      cancelCropBtn.addEventListener('click', closeCropper);\n      applyCropBtn.addEventListener('click', applyCrop);\n\n      // Close modal on backdrop click\n      cropperModal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n        if (e.target === cropperModal) {\n          closeCropper();\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Center image upload handler (for circular visualizer)\n      centerImage.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {\n        const file = e.target.files[0];\n        if (file) {\n          const reader = new FileReader();\n          reader.onload = async (event) => {\n            const dataUrl = event.target.result;\n            // Open cropper modal instead of applying directly\n            openCropper(dataUrl);\n          };\n          reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Center image zoom handler\n      centerImageZoom.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const zoomValue = parseInt(centerImageZoom.value);\n        centerImageZoomValue.textContent = zoomValue + '%';\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n          custom: {\n            centerImageZoom: zoomValue / 100,\n          },\n        });\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n      centerImageZoom.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Center image offset X handler\n      centerImageOffsetX.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const offsetXVal = parseInt(centerImageOffsetX.value);\n        centerImageOffsetXValue.textContent = offsetXVal + 'px';\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n          custom: {\n            centerImageOffsetX: offsetXVal,\n          },\n        });\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n      centerImageOffsetX.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Center image offset Y handler\n      centerImageOffsetY.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const offsetYVal = parseInt(centerImageOffsetY.value);\n        centerImageOffsetYValue.textContent = offsetYVal + 'px';\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n          custom: {\n            centerImageOffsetY: offsetYVal,\n          },\n        });\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n      centerImageOffsetY.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Update progress bar with accessibility\n      const progressBar = document.querySelector('.progress-bar');\n      const updateProgress = (progress) => {\n        const percentage = Math.round(progress * 100);\n        progressBar.setAttribute('aria-valuenow', percentage);\n        progressFill.style.width = percentage + '%';\n      };\n\n      // Audio file for conversion\n      audioFile.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        convertBtn.disabled = !audioFile.files.length || isRecording || isPreviewing;\n        previewBtn.disabled = !audioFile.files.length || isRecording || isConverting || isPreviewing;\n      });\n\n      // Stop preview function\n      function stopPreview() {\n        if (previewAudioElement) {\n          previewAudioElement.pause();\n          previewAudioElement.currentTime = 0;\n          previewAudioElement = null;\n        }\n        isPreviewing = false;\n        updateStatus('Ready - Select an audio file to preview or convert', 'ready');\n        updateButtonStates();\n      }\n\n      // Preview audio with live visualization\n      previewBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n        const file = audioFile.files[0];\n        if (!file) return;\n\n        isPreviewing = true;\n        updateStatus('Previewing audio with visualization (adjust settings in real-time)...', 'recording');\n        updateButtonStates();\n\n        try {\n          // Stop microphone if active to avoid conflicts\n          if (recorder.sourceType === 'microphone') {\n            recorder.stopMicrophone();\n          }\n\n          // Connect the audio file to the recorder for live visualization\n          previewAudioElement = await recorder.connectAudioFile(file);\n\n          // Set loop mode based on checkbox\n          previewAudioElement.loop = loopPreviewCheckbox.checked;\n\n          // Start playback\n          await previewAudioElement.play();\n\n          // Listen for audio end (if not looping)\n          previewAudioElement.addEventListener('ended', () => {\n            if (!previewAudioElement.loop) {\n              stopPreview();\n            }\n          });\n        } catch (error) {\n          isPreviewing = false;\n          updateStatus('Error: ' + error.message, 'error');\n          updateButtonStates();\n          console.error(error);\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Stop preview button\n      stopPreviewBtn.addEventListener('click', stopPreview);\n\n      // Update loop setting when checkbox changes during preview\n      loopPreviewCheckbox.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        if (previewAudioElement) {\n          previewAudioElement.loop = loopPreviewCheckbox.checked;\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Convert audio to video\n      convertBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n        const file = audioFile.files[0];\n        if (!file) return;\n\n        // Stop preview if running\n        if (isPreviewing) {\n          stopPreview();\n        }\n\n        isConverting = true;\n        convertBtn.disabled = true;\n        convertBtn.style.display = 'none';\n        cancelConvertBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n        progressBar.style.display = 'block';\n        updateStatus('Converting audio to video...', 'recording');\n        updateButtonStates();\n\n        // Pause AudioRecorder visualization during conversion to prevent flickering\n        // (both would draw to the same canvas causing visual artifacts)\n        const wasVisualizationActive = recorder.isVisualizationActive;\n        if (wasVisualizationActive) {\n          recorder.stopVisualization();\n        }\n\n        try {\n          // Get video dimensions based on quality setting\n          const qualityMap = {\n            '720p': { width: 1280, height: 720 },\n            '1080p': { width: 1920, height: 1080 },\n            '1440p': { width: 2560, height: 1440 },\n            '2160p': { width: 3840, height: 2160 },\n          };\n          const quality = qualityMap[videoQuality.value] || qualityMap['1080p'];\n\n          const blob = await converter.convert({\n            audioSource: file,\n            canvas,\n            visualizer: visualizerSelect.value,\n            visualizerOptions: getCurrentOptions(),\n            fps: 30,\n            videoWidth: quality.width,\n            videoHeight: quality.height,\n            format: videoFormat.value,\n            onProgress: updateProgress,\n          });\n\n          updateStatus('Conversion complete!', 'ready');\n          addRecording(blob);\n        } catch (error) {\n          if (error.message.includes('cancelled')) {\n            updateStatus('Conversion cancelled', 'ready');\n          } else {\n            updateStatus('Error: ' + error.message, 'error');\n          }\n          console.error(error);\n        } finally {\n          isConverting = false;\n          convertBtn.disabled = false;\n          convertBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n          cancelConvertBtn.style.display = 'none';\n          progressBar.style.display = 'none';\n          updateProgress(0);\n          updateButtonStates();\n\n          // Resume AudioRecorder visualization if it was active before conversion\n          if (wasVisualizationActive && recorder.sourceType) {\n            recorder.resumeVisualization();\n          }\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Cancel conversion\n      cancelConvertBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        converter.cancel();\n        updateStatus('Cancelling conversion...', 'ready');\n      });\n\n      // Canvas drag support for adjusting visualization position\n      let canvasDragging = false;\n      let canvasDragStartX = 0;\n      let canvasDragStartY = 0;\n      let canvasDragStartOffsetX = 0;\n      let canvasDragStartOffsetY = 0;\n      let isDraggingCenterImage = false; // Track if we're dragging center image (Shift key)\n\n      // Mouse drag handlers for canvas\n      canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n        canvasDragging = true;\n        canvasDragStartX = e.clientX;\n        canvasDragStartY = e.clientY;\n\n        // Check if Shift key is held and we're in circular mode with center image\n        isDraggingCenterImage = e.shiftKey && visualizerSelect.value === 'circular' && currentCenterImageUrl;\n\n        if (isDraggingCenterImage) {\n          canvasDragStartOffsetX = parseInt(centerImageOffsetX.value);\n          canvasDragStartOffsetY = parseInt(centerImageOffsetY.value);\n        } else {\n          canvasDragStartOffsetX = parseInt(offsetX.value);\n          canvasDragStartOffsetY = parseInt(offsetY.value);\n        }\n        canvas.style.cursor = 'grabbing';\n      });\n\n      canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        if (!canvasDragging) coordinates to canvas coordinates\n        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;\n        const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;\n innerRadius = 0.3 * minDimension; // matches CircularVisualizer innerRadius\n        const centerRadius = innerRadius * 0.9; // matches center circle radius\n\n        // Check if mouse is within the center circle\n        const distance = Math.sqrt((canvasX - centerX) ** 2 + (canvasY - centerY) ** 2);\n        return distance <= centerRadius;\n      }\n\n      // Add scroll-to-zoom for center recorder.setVisualizerOptions(getCurrentOptions());\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n\n      // ============================================================\n      // Blink Debug Mode Functionality\n      // ============================================================\n\n      // Helper function to format time as m:ss or mm:ss\n      function formatTime(seconds) {\n        const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n        const secs = Math.floor(seconds % 60);\n        return `${mins}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;\n      }\n\n      // Helper function to format time with decimals\n      function formatTimeWithDecimals(seconds) {\n        return seconds.toFixed(2) + 's';\n      }\n\n      // Draw waveform on canvas\n      function drawBlinkWaveform(audioBuffer) {\n        const canvas = blinkWaveformCanvas;\n        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n        const width = canvas.width;\n        const height = canvas.height;\n\n        // Clear canvas\n        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Get audio data (use first channel)\n        const channelData = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);\n        const samplesPerPixel = Math.floor(channelData.length / width);\n\n        // Draw waveform\n        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8)';\n        const centerY = height / 2;\n\n        for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {\n          const startSample = x * samplesPerPixel;\n          let min = 1;\n          let max = -1;\n\n          // Find min and max in this segment\n          for (let i = 0; i < samplesPerPixel && startSample + i < channelData.length; i++) {\n            const sample = channelData[startSample + i];\n            if (sample < min) min = sample;\n            if (sample > max) max = sample;\n          }\n\n          // Draw vertical line representing the amplitude range\n          const minY = centerY + min * (height / 2);\n          const maxY = centerY + max * (height / 2);\n          ctx.fillRect(x, maxY, 1, minY - maxY || 1);\n        }\n\n        // Draw center line\n        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)';\n        ctx.beginPath();\n        ctx.moveTo(0, centerY);\n        ctx.lineTo(width, centerY);\n        ctx.stroke();\n      }\n\n      // Update selection overlay position\n      function updateSelectionOverlay() {\n        if (blinkDebugAudioDuration <= 0) return;\n\n        const canvas = blinkWaveformCanvas;\n        const width = canvas.offsetWidth;\n\n        if (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime > 0 || blinkDebugIntervalEndTime > 0) {\n          const startX = (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime / blinkDebugAudioDuration) * width;\n          const endX = (blinkDebugIntervalEndTime / blinkDebugAudioDuration) * width;\n\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.display = 'block';\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.left = startX + 'px';\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.width = (endX - startX) + 'px';\n\n          blinkIntervalDisplay.textContent = `${formatTimeWithDecimals(blinkDebugIntervalStartTime)} - ${formatTimeWithDecimals(blinkDebugIntervalEndTime)}`;\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = false;\n          blinkClearIntervalBtn.disabled = false;\n        } else {\n          blinkSelectionOverlay.style.display = 'none';\n          blinkIntervalDisplay.textContent = '0.00s - 0.00s';\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = true;\n          blinkClearIntervalBtn.disabled = true;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Analyze audio interval to extract frequency and volume parameters\n      async function analyzeAudioInterval(audioBuffer, startTime, endTime) {\n        if (!audioBuffer || startTime >= endTime) return null;\n\n        const sampleRate = audioBuffer.sampleRate;\n        const channelData = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);\n\n        // Calculate sample indices\n        const startSample = Math.floor(startTime * sampleRate);\n        const endSample = Math.floor(endTime * sampleRate);\n\n        if (startSample >= channelData.length) return null;\n\n        // Extract the interval data\n        const intervalData = channelData.slice(startSample, Math.min(endSample, channelData.length));\n\n        // Calculate RMS volume\n        let sumSquares = 0;\n        let maxAmp = 0;\n        for (let i = 0; i < intervalData.length; i++) {\n          const amp = Math.abs(intervalData[i]);\n          sumSquares += amp * amp;\n          if (amp > maxAmp) maxAmp = amp;\n        }\n        const rms = Math.sqrt(sumSquares / intervalData.length);\n\n        // Convert RMS to 0-255 scale (approximate threshold)\n        const volumeThreshold = Math.round(maxAmp * 255);\n\n        // Perform simple frequency analysis using zero crossing rate\n        // This gives a rough estimate of the dominant frequency\n        let zeroCrossings = 0;\n        for (let i = 1; i < intervalData.length; i++) {\n          if ((intervalData[i] >= 0 && intervalData[i - 1] < 0) ||\n              (intervalData[i] < 0 && intervalData[i - 1] >= 0)) {\n            zeroCrossings++;\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Estimate frequency from zero crossing rate\n        const durationSecs = (endTime - startTime);\n        const estimatedFreq = (zeroCrossings / 2) / durationSecs;\n\n        // Create a reasonable frequency range around the estimated frequency\n        const freqMin = Math.max(20, Math.round(estimatedFreq * 0.5));\n        const freqMax = Math.min(2000, Math.round(estimatedFreq * 1.5));\n\n        return {\n          frequencyMin: freqMin,\n          frequencyMax: freqMax,\n          volumeThreshold: Math.max(50, Math.min(255, volumeThreshold)),\n        };\n      }\n\n      // Update extracted parameters display and apply to visualizer\n      async function updateExtractedParams() {\n        if (!blinkDebugAudioBuffer || blinkDebugIntervalStartTime >= blinkDebugIntervalEndTime) {\n          blinkExtractedParams.style.display = 'none';\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const params = await analyzeAudioInterval(\n          blinkDebugAudioBuffer,\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime,\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime\n        );\n\n        if (params) {\n          blinkExtractedParams.style.display = 'block';\n          blinkExtractedFreq.textContent = `${params.frequencyMin} - ${params.frequencyMax} Hz`;\n          blinkExtractedThreshold.textContent = params.volumeThreshold;\n\n          // Apply the extracted parameters to the visualizer\n          blinkFrequencyMin.value = params.frequencyMin;\n          blinkFrequencyMax.value = params.frequencyMax;\n          blinkThreshold.value = params.volumeThreshold;\n          blinkFrequencyValue.textContent = `${params.frequencyMin} - ${params.frequencyMax}`;\n          blinkThresholdValue.textContent = params.volumeThreshold;\n\n          recorder.setVisualizerOptions(getCurrentOptions());\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Load audio file and create waveform visualization\n      async function loadBlinkDebugAudio(dataUrl) {\n        try {\n          // Create audio context if needed\n          if (!blinkDebugAudioContext) {\n            blinkDebugAudioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();\n          }\n\n          // Decode audio data\n          const response = await fetch(dataUrl);\n          const arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n          blinkDebugAudioBuffer = await blinkDebugAudioContext.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);\n          blinkDebugAudioDuration = blinkDebugAudioBuffer.duration;\n\n          // Draw waveform\n          drawBlinkWaveform(blinkDebugAudioBuffer);\n\n          // Update time labels\n          blinkWaveformStart.textContent = '0:00';\n          blinkWaveformEnd.textContent = formatTime(blinkDebugAudioDuration);\n\n          // Show waveform container\n          blinkWaveformContainer.style.display = 'block';\n\n          // Update selection overlay\n          updateSelectionOverlay();\n\n          // Update extracted params if interval is set\n          if (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime > 0 || blinkDebugIntervalEndTime > 0) {\n            await updateExtractedParams();\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error('Error loading debug audio:', error);\n          blinkWaveformContainer.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Debug mode enable/disable handler\n      blinkDebugModeEnabled.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        const enabled = blinkDebugModeEnabled.checked;\n        blinkDebugControls.style.display = enabled ? 'block' : 'none';\n        blinkManualControls.style.display = enabled ? 'none' : 'block';\n\n        // If enabling and we have saved audio data, load it\n        if (enabled && blinkDebugAudioDataUrl) {\n          loadBlinkDebugAudio(blinkDebugAudioDataUrl);\n        }\n\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Debug audio file input handler\n      blinkDebugAudioFile.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {\n        const file = e.target.files[0];\n        if (!file) return;\n\n        blinkDebugAudioFileName = file.name;\n        blinkDebugFileName.textContent = file.name;\n\n        // Convert to data URL for persistence\n        const reader = new FileReader();\n        reader.onload = async (event) => {\n          blinkDebugAudioDataUrl = event.target.result;\n\n          // Reset interval selection\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = 0;\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = 0;\n\n          // Load and display waveform\n          await loadBlinkDebugAudio(blinkDebugAudioDataUrl);\n\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        };\n        reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n      });\n\n      // Waveform canvas mouse events for interval selection\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n        if (!blinkDebugAudioBuffer) return;\n\n        blinkDebugIsSelecting = true;\n        const rect = blinkWaveformCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n        blinkDebugSelectionStartX = x;\n\n        // Calculate time from x position\n        const width = rect.width;\n        blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = (x / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n        blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = blinkDebugIntervalStartTime;\n\n        updateSelectionOverlay();\n      });\n\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        if (!blinkDebugIsSelecting) return;\n\n        const rect = blinkWaveformCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n        const width = rect.width;\n\n        // Calculate time from x position\n        const currentTime = (x / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n\n        // Update start and end times based on drag direction\n        if (x >= blinkDebugSelectionStartX) {\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = (blinkDebugSelectionStartX / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = currentTime;\n        } else {\n          blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = currentTime;\n          blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = (blinkDebugSelectionStartX / width) * blinkDebugAudioDuration;\n        }\n\n        // Clamp values\n        blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = Math.max(0, blinkDebugIntervalStartTime);\n        blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = Math.min(blinkDebugAudioDuration, blinkDebugIntervalEndTime);\n\n        updateSelectionOverlay();\n      });\n\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', async () => {\n        if (blinkDebugIsSelecting) {\n          blinkDebugIsSelecting = false;\n\n          // Analyze the selected interval\n          await updateExtractedParams();\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      });\n\n      blinkWaveformCanvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', async () => {\n        if (blinkDebugIsSelecting) {\n          blinkDebugIsSelecting = false;\n\n          // Analyze the selected interval\n          await updateExtractedParams();\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Play interval button handler\n      blinkPlayIntervalBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        if (!blinkDebugAudioBuffer || !blinkDebugAudioContext) return;\n        if (blinkDebugIntervalStartTime >= blinkDebugIntervalEndTime) return;\n\n        // Stop any existing playback\n        if (blinkDebugAudioSource) {\n          try {\n            blinkDebugAudioSource.stop();\n          } catch (e) {\n            // Ignore if already stopped\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Create new source and play the interval\n        blinkDebugAudioSource = blinkDebugAudioContext.createBufferSource();\n        blinkDebugAudioSource.buffer = blinkDebugAudioBuffer;\n        blinkDebugAudioSource.connect(blinkDebugAudioContext.destination);\n\n        const duration = blinkDebugIntervalEndTime - blinkDebugIntervalStartTime;\n        blinkDebugAudioSource.start(0, blinkDebugIntervalStartTime, duration);\n\n        // Update button text during playback\n        blinkPlayIntervalBtn.textContent = 'Playing...';\n        blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = true;\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.textContent = 'Play Interval';\n          blinkPlayIntervalBtn.disabled = false;\n        }, duration * 1000);\n      });\n\n      // Clear interval button handler\n      blinkClearIntervalBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = 0;\n        blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = 0;\n        blinkExtractedParams.style.display = 'none';\n        updateSelectionOverlay();\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Initialize debug mode from saved settings after page load\n      if (savedSettings.blinkDebugModeEnabled && savedSettings.blinkDebugAudioData) {\n        // Defer loading to allow page to fully initialize\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          loadBlinkDebugAudio(savedSettings.blinkDebugAudioData);\n        }, 500);\n      }\n\n      // ============================================================\n      // End Blink Debug Mode Functionality\n      // ============================================================\n\n      // Image Cropper functionality\n      const cropperModal = document.getElementById('imageCropperModal');\n      const cropperCanvas = document.getElementById('cropperCanvas');\n      const cropperCtx = cropperCanvas.getContext('2d');\n      const cropperZoom = document.getElementById('cropperZoom');\n      const cropperZoomValue = document.getElementById('cropperZoomValue');\n      const closeCropperBtn = document.getElementById('closeCropperBtn');\n      const cancelCropBtn = document.getElementById('cancelCropBtn');\n      const applyCropBtn = document.getElementById('applyCropBtn');\n\n      let cropperImage = null;\n      let cropperScale = 1;\n      let cropperOffsetX = 0;\n      let cropperOffsetY = 0;\n      let isDragging = false;\n      let dragStartX = 0;\n      let dragStartY = 0;\n      let dragStartOffsetX = 0;\n      let dragStartOffsetY = 0;\n\n      function openCropper(imageDataUrl) {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          cropperImage = img;\n          cropperScale = 1;\n          cropperOffsetX = 0;\n          cropperOffsetY = 0;\n          cropperZoom.value = 100;\n          cropperZoomValue.textContent = '100%';\n\n          // Set canvas size to fit container (400x400)\n          cropperCanvas.width = 400;\n          cropperCanvas.height = 400;\n\n          cropperModal.style.display = 'flex';\n          drawCropper();\n        };\n        img.src = imageDataUrl;\n      }\n\n      function closeCropper() {\n        cropperModal.style.display = 'none';\n        cropperImage = null;\n        cropperOffsetX = 0;\n        cropperOffsetY = 0;\n        isDragging = false;\n        // Reset file input\n        centerImage.value = '';\n      }\n\n      function drawCropper() {\n        if (!cropperImage) return;\n\n        cropperCtx.clearRect(0, 0, cropperCanvas.width, cropperCanvas.height);\n        cropperCtx.fillStyle = '#000';\n        cropperCtx.fillRect(0, 0, cropperCanvas.width, cropperCanvas.height);\n\n        // Calculate scaled dimensions\n        const scale = cropperScale;\n        const imgWidth = cropperImage.width * scale;\n        const imgHeight = cropperImage.height * scale;\n\n        // Center the image with offset for dragging\n        const x = (cropperCanvas.width - imgWidth) / 2 + cropperOffsetX;\n        const y = (cropperCanvas.height - imgHeight) / 2 + cropperOffsetY;\n\n        cropperCtx.drawImage(cropperImage, x, y, imgWidth, imgHeight);\n      }\n\n      // Mouse drag handlers for cropper\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n        isDragging = true;\n        dragStartX = e.clientX;\n        dragStartY = e.clientY;\n        dragStartOffsetX = cropperOffsetX;\n        dragStartOffsetY = cropperOffsetY;\n        cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grabbing';\n      });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        if (!isDragging) return;\n        const dx = e.clientX - dragStartX;\n        const dy = e.clientY - dragStartY;\n        cropperOffsetX = dragStartOffsetX + dx;\n        cropperOffsetY = dragStartOffsetY + dy;\n        drawCropper();\n      });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {\n        isDragging = false;\n        cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n      });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {\n        if (isDragging) {\n          isDragging = false;\n          cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Set initial cursor style\n      cropperCanvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n\n      // Touch support for mobile\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {\n        if (e.touches.length === 1) {\n          isDragging = true;\n          dragStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;\n          dragStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;\n          dragStartOffsetX = cropperOffsetX;\n          dragStartOffsetY = cropperOffsetY;\n          e.preventDefault();\n        }\n      }, { passive: false });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {\n        if (!isDragging || e.touches.length !== 1) return;\n        const dx = e.touches[0].clientX - dragStartX;\n        const dy = e.touches[0].clientY - dragStartY;\n        cropperOffsetX = dragStartOffsetX + dx;\n        cropperOffsetY = dragStartOffsetY + dy;\n        drawCropper();\n        e.preventDefault();\n      }, { passive: false });\n\n      cropperCanvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {\n        isDragging = false;\n      });\n\n      function applyCrop() {\n        if (!cropperImage) return;\n\n        // Create a temporary canvas for the cropped result\n        // Use high resolution (512x512) to prevent pixelation when displayed in visualizer\n        const resultCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n        const resultCtx = resultCanvas.getContext('2d');\n        const cropSize = 512; // Higher resolution for better quality\n\n        resultCanvas.width = cropSize;\n        resultCanvas.height = cropSize;\n\n        // Enable high-quality image smoothing\n        resultCtx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n        resultCtx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n        // Calculate the source rectangle from the cropper canvas\n        const centerX = cropperCanvas.width / 2;\n        const centerY = cropperCanvas.height / 2;\n        const cropRadius = 100; // Half of display cropSize (200px circle in cropper UI)\n\n        // Get the visible portion parameters (including drag offset)\n        const scale = cropperScale;\n        const imgWidth = cropperImage.width * scale;\n        const imgHeight = cropperImage.height * scale;\n        const imgX = (cropperCanvas.width - imgWidth) / 2 + cropperOffsetX;\n        const imgY = (cropperCanvas.height - imgHeight) / 2 + cropperOffsetY;\n\n        // Calculate source coordinates on the original image\n        const srcCenterX = (centerX - imgX) / scale;\n        const srcCenterY = (centerY - imgY) / scale;\n        const srcRadius = cropRadius / scale;\n\n        // Draw the cropped circular image\n        resultCtx.save();\n        resultCtx.beginPath();\n        resultCtx.arc(cropSize / 2, cropSize / 2, cropSize / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n        resultCtx.clip();\n\n        // Draw image centered in the circle at high resolution\n        resultCtx.drawImage(\n          cropperImage,\n          srcCenterX - srcRadius,\n          srcCenterY - srcRadius,\n          srcRadius * 2,\n          srcRadius * 2,\n          0,\n          0,\n          cropSize,\n          cropSize\n        );\n        resultCtx.restore();\n\n        // Convert to data URL and save with high quality\n        const croppedDataUrl = resultCanvas.toDataURL('image/png', 1.0);\n        currentCenterImageUrl = croppedDataUrl;\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({ custom: { centerImage: croppedDataUrl } });\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n\n        // Show center image position controls since we now have a center image\n        centerImagePositionControls.style.display = 'grid';\n\n        closeCropper();\n        updatePreview();\n      }\n\n      // Cropper zoom handler\n      cropperZoom.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const zoomPercent = parseInt(cropperZoom.value);\n        cropperZoomValue.textContent = zoomPercent + '%';\n        cropperScale = zoomPercent / 100;\n        drawCropper();\n      });\n\n      // Cropper button handlers\n      closeCropperBtn.addEventListener('click', closeCropper);\n      cancelCropBtn.addEventListener('click', closeCropper);\n      applyCropBtn.addEventListener('click', applyCrop);\n\n      // Close modal on backdrop click\n      cropperModal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n        if (e.target === cropperModal) {\n          closeCropper();\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Center image upload handler (for circular visualizer)\n      centerImage.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {\n        const file = e.target.files[0];\n        if (file) {\n          const reader = new FileReader();\n          reader.onload = async (event) => {\n            const dataUrl = event.target.result;\n            // Open cropper modal instead of applying directly\n            openCropper(dataUrl);\n          };\n          reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Center image zoom handler\n      centerImageZoom.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const zoomValue = parseInt(centerImageZoom.value);\n        centerImageZoomValue.textContent = zoomValue + '%';\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n          custom: {\n            centerImageZoom: zoomValue / 100,\n          },\n        });\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n      centerImageZoom.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Center image offset X handler\n      centerImageOffsetX.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const offsetXVal = parseInt(centerImageOffsetX.value);\n        centerImageOffsetXValue.textContent = offsetXVal + 'px';\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n          custom: {\n            centerImageOffsetX: offsetXVal,\n          },\n        });\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n      centerImageOffsetX.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Center image offset Y handler\n      centerImageOffsetY.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        const offsetYVal = parseInt(centerImageOffsetY.value);\n        centerImageOffsetYValue.textContent = offsetYVal + 'px';\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n          custom: {\n            centerImageOffsetY: offsetYVal,\n          },\n        });\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n      centerImageOffsetY.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n      });\n\n      // Update progress bar with accessibility\n      const progressBar = document.querySelector('.progress-bar');\n      const updateProgress = (progress) => {\n        const percentage = Math.round(progress * 100);\n        progressBar.setAttribute('aria-valuenow', percentage);\n        progressFill.style.width = percentage + '%';\n      };\n\n      // Audio file for conversion\n      audioFile.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        convertBtn.disabled = !audioFile.files.length || isRecording || isPreviewing;\n        previewBtn.disabled = !audioFile.files.length || isRecording || isConverting || isPreviewing;\n      });\n\n      // Stop preview function\n      function stopPreview() {\n        if (previewAudioElement) {\n          previewAudioElement.pause();\n          previewAudioElement.currentTime = 0;\n          previewAudioElement = null;\n        }\n        isPreviewing = false;\n        updateStatus('Ready - Select an audio file to preview or convert', 'ready');\n        updateButtonStates();\n      }\n\n      // Preview audio with live visualization\n      previewBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n        const file = audioFile.files[0];\n        if (!file) return;\n\n        isPreviewing = true;\n        updateStatus('Previewing audio with visualization (adjust settings in real-time)...', 'recording');\n        updateButtonStates();\n\n        try {\n          // Stop microphone if active to avoid conflicts\n          if (recorder.sourceType === 'microphone') {\n            recorder.stopMicrophone();\n          }\n\n          // Connect the audio file to the recorder for live visualization\n          previewAudioElement = await recorder.connectAudioFile(file);\n\n          // Set loop mode based on checkbox\n          previewAudioElement.loop = loopPreviewCheckbox.checked;\n\n          // Start playback\n          await previewAudioElement.play();\n\n          // Listen for audio end (if not looping)\n          previewAudioElement.addEventListener('ended', () => {\n            if (!previewAudioElement.loop) {\n              stopPreview();\n            }\n          });\n        } catch (error) {\n          isPreviewing = false;\n          updateStatus('Error: ' + error.message, 'error');\n          updateButtonStates();\n          console.error(error);\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Stop preview button\n      stopPreviewBtn.addEventListener('click', stopPreview);\n\n      // Update loop setting when checkbox changes during preview\n      loopPreviewCheckbox.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        if (previewAudioElement) {\n          previewAudioElement.loop = loopPreviewCheckbox.checked;\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Convert audio to video\n      convertBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n        const file = audioFile.files[0];\n        if (!file) return;\n\n        // Stop preview if running\n        if (isPreviewing) {\n          stopPreview();\n        }\n\n        isConverting = true;\n        convertBtn.disabled = true;\n        convertBtn.style.display = 'none';\n        cancelConvertBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n        progressBar.style.display = 'block';\n        updateStatus('Converting audio to video...', 'recording');\n        updateButtonStates();\n\n        // Pause AudioRecorder visualization during conversion to prevent flickering\n        // (both would draw to the same canvas causing visual artifacts)\n        const wasVisualizationActive = recorder.isVisualizationActive;\n        if (wasVisualizationActive) {\n          recorder.stopVisualization();\n        }\n\n        try {\n          // Get video dimensions based on quality setting\n          const qualityMap = {\n            '720p': { width: 1280, height: 720 },\n            '1080p': { width: 1920, height: 1080 },\n            '1440p': { width: 2560, height: 1440 },\n            '2160p': { width: 3840, height: 2160 },\n          };\n          const quality = qualityMap[videoQuality.value] || qualityMap['1080p'];\n\n          const blob = await converter.convert({\n            audioSource: file,\n            canvas,\n            visualizer: visualizerSelect.value,\n            visualizerOptions: getCurrentOptions(),\n            fps: 30,\n            videoWidth: quality.width,\n            videoHeight: quality.height,\n            format: videoFormat.value,\n            onProgress: updateProgress,\n          });\n\n          updateStatus('Conversion complete!', 'ready');\n          addRecording(blob);\n        } catch (error) {\n          if (error.message.includes('cancelled')) {\n            updateStatus('Conversion cancelled', 'ready');\n          } else {\n            updateStatus('Error: ' + error.message, 'error');\n          }\n          console.error(error);\n        } finally {\n          isConverting = false;\n          convertBtn.disabled = false;\n          convertBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n          cancelConvertBtn.style.display = 'none';\n          progressBar.style.display = 'none';\n          updateProgress(0);\n          updateButtonStates();\n\n          // Resume AudioRecorder visualization if it was active before conversion\n          if (wasVisualizationActive && recorder.sourceType) {\n            recorder.resumeVisualization();\n          }\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Cancel conversion\n      cancelConvertBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        converter.cancel();\n        updateStatus('Cancelling conversion...', 'ready');\n      });\n\n      // Canvas drag support for adjusting visualization position\n      let canvasDragging = false;\n      let canvasDragStartX = 0;\n      let canvasDragStartY = 0;\n      let canvasDragStartOffsetX = 0;\n      let canvasDragStartOffsetY = 0;\n      let isDraggingCenterImage = false; // Track if we're dragging center image (Shift key)\n\n      // Mouse drag handlers for canvas\n      canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n        canvasDragging = true;\n        canvasDragStartX = e.clientX;\n        canvasDragStartY = e.clientY;\n\n        // Check if Shift key is held and we're in circular mode with center image\n        isDraggingCenterImage = e.shiftKey && visualizerSelect.value === 'circular' && currentCenterImageUrl;\n\n        if (isDraggingCenterImage) {\n          canvasDragStartOffsetX = parseInt(centerImageOffsetX.value);\n          canvasDragStartOffsetY = parseInt(centerImageOffsetY.value);\n        } else {\n          canvasDragStartOffsetX = parseInt(offsetX.value);\n          canvasDragStartOffsetY = parseInt(offsetY.value);\n        }\n        canvas.style.cursor = 'grabbing';\n      });\n\n      canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        if (!canvasDragging) return;\n        const dx = e.clientX - canvasDragStartX;\n        const dy = e.clientY - canvasDragStartY;\n\n        if (isDraggingCenterImage) {\n          // Drag center image position\n          const newCenterOffsetX = Math.max(-100, Math.min(100, canvasDragStartOffsetX + dx));\n          const newCenterOffsetY = Math.max(-100, Math.min(100, canvasDragStartOffsetY + dy));\n\n          // Update sliders\n          centerImageOffsetX.value = newCenterOffsetX;\n          centerImageOffsetY.value = newCenterOffsetY;\n          centerImageOffsetXValue.textContent = newCenterOffsetX + 'px';\n          centerImageOffsetYValue.textContent = newCenterOffsetY + 'px';\n\n          // Update visualizer\n          recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n            custom: {\n              centerImageOffsetX: newCenterOffsetX,\n              centerImageOffsetY: newCenterOffsetY,\n            },\n          });\n        } else {\n          // Drag visualization position\n          const newOffsetX = Math.max(-200, Math.min(200, canvasDragStartOffsetX + dx));\n          const newOffsetY = Math.max(-200, Math.min(200, canvasDragStartOffsetY + dy));\n\n          // Update sliders\n          offsetX.value = newOffsetX;\n          offsetY.value = newOffsetY;\n          offsetXValue.textContent = newOffsetX + 'px';\n          offsetYValue.textContent = newOffsetY + 'px';\n\n          // Update visualizer\n          recorder.setVisualizerOptions({ offsetX: newOffsetX, offsetY: newOffsetY });\n        }\n        updatePreview();\n      });\n\n      canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {\n        if (canvasDragging) {\n          canvasDragging = false;\n          isDraggingCenterImage = false;\n          canvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      });\n\n      canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {\n        if (canvasDragging) {\n          canvasDragging = false;\n          isDraggingCenterImage = false;\n          canvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Set initial cursor for canvas\n      canvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n\n      // Touch drag handlers for canvas (mobile support)\n      canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {\n        if (e.touches.length === 1) {\n          canvasDragging = true;\n          canvasDragStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;\n          canvasDragStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;\n          canvasDragStartOffsetX = parseInt(offsetX.value);\n          canvasDragStartOffsetY = parseInt(offsetY.value);\n        }\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {\n        if (!canvasDragging) return;\n        const dx = e.touches[0].clientX - canvasDragStartX;\n        const dy = e.touches[0].clientY - canvasDragStartY;\n        const newOffsetX = Math.max(-200, Math.min(200, canvasDragStartOffsetX + dx));\n        const newOffsetY = Math.max(-200, Math.min(200, canvasDragStartOffsetY + dy));\n\n        // Update sliders\n        offsetX.value = newOffsetX;\n        offsetY.value = newOffsetY;\n        offsetXValue.textContent = newOffsetX + 'px';\n        offsetYValue.textContent = newOffsetY + 'px';\n\n        // Update visualizer\n        recorder.setVisualizerOptions({ offsetX: newOffsetX, offsetY: newOffsetY });\n        updatePreview();\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {\n        if (canvasDragging) {\n          canvasDragging = false;\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Helper function to check if mouse is over center image area (for circular visualizer)\n      function isMouseOverCenterImage(e) {\n        if (visualizerSelect.value !== 'circular' || !currentCenterImageUrl) {\n          return false;\n        }\n\n        // Get canvas bounding rect to convert page coordinates to canvas coordinates\n        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;\n        const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;\n        const canvasX = (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX;\n        const canvasY = (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY;\n\n        // Calculate center and radius of the center image area\n        // These should match the CircularVisualizer's center image positioning\n        const centerX = canvas.width / 2 + (parseInt(offsetX.value) || 0);\n        const centerY = canvas.height / 2 + (parseInt(offsetY.value) || 0);\n        const scale = (parseInt(visualizationScale.value) || 100) / 100;\n        const minDimension = Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * scale;\n        const innerRadius = 0.3 * minDimension; // matches CircularVisualizer innerRadius\n        const centerRadius = innerRadius * 0.9; // matches center circle radius\n\n        // Check if mouse is within the center circle\n        const distance = Math.sqrt((canvasX - centerX) ** 2 + (canvasY - centerY) ** 2);\n        return distance <= centerRadius;\n      }\n\n      // Add scroll-to-zoom for center image when hovering over it\n      canvas.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {\n        if (isMouseOverCenterImage(e)) {\n          e.preventDefault();\n\n          // Adjust center image zoom\n          const currentZoom = parseInt(centerImageZoom.value);\n          const step = 10; // 10% per scroll step\n          const delta = e.deltaY < 0 ? step : -step;\n          const newZoom = Math.max(50, Math.min(300, currentZoom + delta));\n\n          centerImageZoom.value = newZoom;\n          centerImageZoomValue.textContent = newZoom + '%';\n          recorder.setVisualizerOptions({\n            custom: {\n              centerImageZoom: newZoom / 100,\n            },\n          });\n          saveSettings(getCurrentSettings());\n          updatePreview();\n        }\n      }, { passive: false });\n\n      // Add visual feedback when hovering over center image\n      canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        if (!canvasDragging && isMouseOverCenterImage(e)) {\n          canvas.style.cursor = 'zoom-in';\n          canvas.title = 'Scroll to zoom center image';\n        } else if (!canvasDragging) {\n          canvas.style.cursor = 'grab';\n          canvas.title = '';\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Add mouse wheel support for all range sliders (only when focused/clicked)\n      const rangeInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[type=\"range\"]');\n      const presentationElectronOnly = document.getElementById('presentationElectronOnly');\n\n      // Settings persistence\n      const SETTINGS_KEY = 'audio-recorder-settings';\n      const ACCORDION_STATE_KEY = 'audio-recorder-accordion-states';\n\n      // Default settings\n      const defaultSettings = {\n        visualizer: 'bars',\n        primaryColor: '#00ff88',\n        secondaryColor: '#0088ff',\n        backgroundColor: '#000000',\n        barCount: 64,\n        frequencyWidth: 100,\n        sensitivity: 1.0,\n        // ADSR envelope settings\n        adsrAttack: offsetY: 0,\n        scale: 100,\n        backgroundImage: null,\n        backgroundSizeMode: 'cover',\n        backgroundWidth: 800,\n        backgroundHeight: 400,\n        videoQuality: '1080p',\n        videoFormat: 'webm',\n        layerEffect: 'none',\n        layerEffectIntensity: 50,\n        useCustomColors: false,\n        centerImage: null,\n        centerImageZoom: 100,\n        centerImageOffsetX: 0,\n        centerImageOffsetY: 0,\n        barShape: 'rounded',\n        particleShape: 'circle',\n        imageBlinkEnabled: false,\n        imageBlinkStyle: 'gradient-sweep',\n        imageBlinkTarget: 'background',\n        imageBlinkFrequencyMin: 60,\n        imageBlinkFrequencyMax: 250,\n        imageBlinkThreshold: 200,\n        imageBlinkIntensity: 80,\n        imageBlinkDuration: 150,\n        // Blink debug mode settings\n        blinkDebugModeEnabled: false,\n        blinkDebugAudioData: null, // base64 encoded audio data\n        blinkDebugAudioName: settings\n        presentationWindowMode: 'alwaysOnTop',\n        presentationWindowType: 'frameless',\n        presentationWidth: 800,\n        presentationHeight: 600,\n        presentationX: null, // null = auto-center, otherwise use saved position\n        presentationY: null,\n        presentationBgOpacity: 0,\n        presentationVisualizationOpacity: 1,\n        presentationClickThrough: true,\n      };\n\n      // Load settings from localStorage\n      function loadSettings() {\n        try {\n          const saved = localStorage.getItem(SETTINGS_KEY);\n          if (saved) {\n            return { ...defaultSettings, ...JSON.parse(saved) };\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.warn('Failed to load settings:', error);\n        }\n        return defaultSettings;\n      }\n\n      // Save settings to localStorage\n      function saveSettings(settings) {\n        try {\n          localStorage.setItem(SETTINGS_KEY, JSON.stringify(settings));\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.warn('Failed to save settings:', error);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Accordion state management\n      function loadAccordionStates() {\n        try {\n          const saved = localStorage.getItem(ACCORDION_STATE_KEY);\n          if (saved) {\n            return JSON.parse(saved);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.warn('Failed to load accordion states:', error);\n        }\n        // Default: all sections expanded\n        return {\n          visualizer: true,\n          colors: true,\n          animation: true,\n          background: true,\n          transform: true,\n          effects: true\n        };\n      }\n\n      function saveAccordionStates(states) {\n        try {\n          localStorage.setItem(ACCORDION_STATE_KEY, JSON.stringify(states));\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.warn('Failed to save accordion states:', error);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Initialize accordions\n      function initializeAccordions() {\n        const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.settings-section[data-section]');\n        const accordionStates = loadAccordionStates();\n\n        sections.forEach(section => {\n          const sectionName = section.getAttribute('data-section');\n          const header = section.querySelector('.settings-section-header');\n          const isExpanded = accordionStates[sectionName] !== false; // Default to true\n\n          // Set initial state\n          if (isExpanded) {\n            section.classList.add('expanded');\n            header.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');\n          } else {\n            header.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');\n          }\n\n          // Add click handler\n          header.addEventListener('click', () => {\n            const wasExpanded = section.classList.toggle('expanded');\n            header.setAttribute('aria-expanded', wasExpanded);\n\n            // Save state\n            accordionStates[sectionName] = wasExpanded;\n            saveAccordionStates(accordionStates);\n          });\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Track background image URL\n      let currentBackgroundImageUrl = null;\n      let currentCenterImageUrl = null;\n\n      // Blink debug mode state\n      let blinkDebugAudioBuffer = null;\n      let blinkDebugAudioContext = null;\n      let blinkDebugAudioSource = null;\n      let blinkDebugAudioDuration = 0;\n      let blinkDebugIntervalStartTime = 0;\n      let blinkDebugIntervalEndTime = 0;\n      let blinkDebugIsSelecting = false;\n      let blinkDebugSelectionStartX = 0;\n      let blinkDebugAudioDataUrl = null;\n      let blinkDebugAudioFileName = null;\n\n      // Get current settings from UI\n      function getCurrentSettings() {\n        return {\n          visualizer: visualizerSelect.value,\n          primaryColor: primaryColor.value,\n          secondaryColor: secondaryColor.value,\n          backgroundColor: bgColor.value,\n          barCount: parseInt(barCount.value),\n          frequencyWidth: parseInt(frequencyWidth.value),\n          sensitivity: parseFloat(sensitivity.value),\n          // ADSR envelope settings\n          adsrAttack: parseInt(adsrAttack.value),\n          adsrDecay: parseInt(adsrDecay.value),\n          adsrSustain: parseInt(adsrSustain.value),\n          adsrRelease: parseInt(adsrRelease.value),\n          mirror: mirror.checked,\n          mirrorHorizontal: mirrorHorizontal.checked,\n          visualizationAlpha: parseFloat(visualizationAlpha.value),\n          offsetX: parseInt(offsetX.value),\n          offsetY: parseInt(offsetY.value),\n          scale: parseInt(visualizationScale.value),\n          backgroundImage: currentBackgroundImageUrl,\n          backgroundSizeMode: bgSizeMode.value,\n          backgroundWidth: parseInt(bgCustomWidth.value),\n          backgroundHeight: parseInt(bgCustomHeight.value),\n          videoQuality: videoQuality.value,\n          videoFormat: videoFormat.value,\n          layerEffect: layerEffect.value,\n          layerEffectIntensity: parseInt(layerEffectIntensity.value),\n          useCustomColors: useCustomColors.checked,\n          centerImage: currentCenterImageUrl,\n          centerImageZoom: imageBlinkTarget: imageBlinkTarget.value,\n          imageBlinkFrequencyMin: parseInt(blinkFrequencyMin.value),\n          imageBlinkFrequencyMax: parseInt(blinkFrequencyMax.value),\n          imageBlinkThreshold: parseInt(blinkThreshold.value),\n          imageBlinkIntensity: parseInt(blinkIntensity.value),\n          imageBlinkDuration: parseInt(blinkDuration.value),\n          // Blink
